INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/cs/help.md', 'Help', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"nápověda-kprogramu"},"NÁPOVĚDA K PROGRAMU"],["p",{},"Základní myšlenka je jednoduchá – sestavíte svůj vstup a po stisknutí tlačítka \"Zapsat rozehru\" se zápis situace zobrazí v sekci \"Výsledek\". Ten je připraven tak, že vypadá jako (modrý) papírový scoresheet WBSC, aby byl dojem co nejbližší tomu, jako kdybyste měli zapsat totožnou akci při sledování skutečné hry. Nad vstupem běží různé validace, které znemožňují některé nesmyslné rozehry, nebo jejich zadávání alespoň omezují."],["p",{},"Je několik předpokladů, které je třeba mít na paměti:"],["ul",{},["li",{},"Program vždy vykreslí POUZE JEDNU ROZEHRU. Může sestávat z více situací (teoreticky až 10 samostatných akcí), ale všechny se musí stát během jednoho nadhozu (nebo během času mezi dvěma nadhozy). Není možné sledovat průběh celého zápasu."],["li",{},"Kvůli výše uvedenému jsou umístění běžce na metu označena ",["span",{"style":"color: red"},"červenou hvězdičkou"],". Toto není žádná oficiální zkratka pro zápis, tím pouze dáváme najevo, že se předtím stala NĚJAKÁ situace, díky které je běžec na metě, z níž začíná. Akci nechceme zapisovat a nestaráme se o ni. Jedinou výjimkou je běžec v tie-breaku (TIE), protože to je speciální a předem daná situace."],["li",{},"Pálkařské pořadí začíná vždy od 1. V závislosti na počtu zúčastněných hráčů může výsledek ukazovat hráče 1-4 v pálkařském pořadí. Není však možné vybrat jiné výchozí pořadí ani přeskočit některé hráče mezi."]],["h2",{"id":"ovládání"},"OVLÁDÁNÍ"],["h3",{"id":"základy"},"Základy"],["p",{},"Když zobrazíte stránku, uvidíte základní vstup připravený k zadání akce pálkaře:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"01-basic-input.png","alt":"","css":"w-full sm:w-[640px]"}]],["p",{},"Pod tím je základní sekce pro výstup skládající se z prázdného prvku scoresheetu a tlačítka \"Stáhnout obrázek\":"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"02-basic-output.png","alt":"",":width":"200"}]],["h3",{"id":"zadání-první-rozehry"},"Zadání první rozehry"],["p",{},"Začínáte výběrem možnosti z prvního combo-boxu ",["strong",{},"Situace"],", který obsahuje skupiny možných akcí. Interně se tomu říká \"základní (base) akce\":"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"03-base-action.png","alt":"",":width":"200"}]],["p",{},"Na základě výběru se aktivuje druhý combo-box a je naplněn odpovídajícím seznamem možných variant. Tomu se říká \"konkrétní (specific) akce\":"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"04-specific-action.png","alt":"",":width":"400"}]],["p",{},"Třetím prvkem každé akce je ",["strong",{},"Pozice"],". To znamená pozice hráčů v obraně nebo místa na hřišti (v určitých případech). Dostupnost těchto UI prvků závisí na výběru konkrétní akce. U některých situací není povolena žádná další informace, u některých je přesně jedna nebo přesně dvě možnosti. U ostatních můžete vybrat 1-4. Nové vstupy přidáte tlačítkem zelené \"+P\" a odstraníte je tlačítkem červené \"-P\" (viz dále). Pokud není možné přidat/odstranit vstupy, tlačítka nejsou aktivní."],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"05-involved.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"Jakmile jste připraveni nechat vykreslit výstup své rozehry, stiskněte modré tlačítko \"Zapsat rozehru\":"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"06-generate.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"Výsledek bude vykreslen do scoresheetu:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"07-result.png","alt":"",":width":"200"}]],["p",{},"Hotový obrázek si můžete stáhnout a uložit buď kliknutím pravým tlačítkem a výběrem z kontextového menu, nebo zeleným tlačítkem \"Stáhnout obrázek\":"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"08-download.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["h3",{"id":"pokročilé-běžci"},"Pokročilé – Běžci"],["p",{},"Akce nejsou omezeny jen na pálkaře. K dispozici je toolbar, který vám umožňuje vybrat, kteří hráči se do rozehry zapojili:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"09-pick-players.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"Tlačítka jsou označena \"B\" pro pálkaře (batter) a \"R1-R3\" pro běžce (runner), kteří startují na příslušné metě. Když je kterékoli z tlačítek vybráno, má červenou barvu a \"-\" před označením. Je vykreslen příslušný set vstupů. Zelená tlačítka s \"+\" před označením znamenají, že tato pozice se aktuálně nepoužívá. Kliknutím na kterékoli z tlačítek se změní jeho stav. Například kliknutím na \"+R1\" má za následek:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"10-runner-input.png","alt":"","css":"w-full sm:w-[640px]"}]],["p",{},"Další kliknutí vstupy znovu skryje. Můžete zvolit jakoukoli kombinaci s nebo bez pálkaře a s nebo bez běžců. Jediným požadavkem je mít vybraného alespoň jednoho hráče."],["p",{},"Vstup běžce je mírně odlišný od vstupu pálkaře a mezi metami jsou také drobné rozdíly. Pokud je zaškrtnuto a vybraná rozehra má za následek aut, nebude propojen s dalším autem (či auty). To lze využít pro situaci, kdy v důsledku chyby (zapsané či skryté (extempted)) dojde k rozbití přirozeného flow double play hry."],["p",{},"Z rozevírací nabídky \"Meta\" vybíráte metu, u které probíhá aktuální akce běžce. Samozřejmě možnosti jsou upraveny v závislosti na tom, na které metě se právě nacházíme. Pokud potřebujete, aby běžec zůstal na dosavadní metě, neděláte to zde, ale místo toho si z nabídky \"Akce\" vyberete \"Žádný postup\"."],["p",{},"Pokud je vybrána situace vedoucí k safe na domácí metě, stane se viditelnou rozevírací nabídka \"Doběh\". Pak si vyberete z možností \"ER\" ",["em",{},"(umožněný bod)"]," / \"UE\" ",["em",{},"(neumožněný bod)"]," / \"TU\" ",["em",{},"(týmově neumožněný bod)"],". Tato funkce je zde hlavně k tomu, aby ukázala rozdíly mezi jednotlivými variantami. Existují některé základní validace, ale během skutečného zápasu záleží na širším kontextu předchozích rozeher, zatímco zde vždy skórujeme jen jednu samostatnou akci. \"Doběh\" je možný i pro pálkaře, ale pouze pro akce typu \"Hit – Home run\"."],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"11-type-of-run.png","alt":"",":height":"150"}]],["h3",{"id":"pokročilé-extra-vstupy"},"Pokročilé – Extra vstupy"],["p",{},"Pokud je potřeba, může být s počáteční akcí spojena více než jedna další situace. Pomocí zeleného tlačítka \"+\" pod sekci \"Pozice\" můžete vykreslit novou skupinu vstupů:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"12-plus-action.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"Tlačítko je aktivní pouze, pokud vybraná rozehra končí jako safe. Panel s novými vstupy se vykreslí přímo pod ním:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"13-extra-input.png","alt":"",":width":"600"}]],["p",{},"Pokud si to rozmyslíte, skryjete a tím deaktivujete extra vstupy pomocí červeného tlačítka \"-\":"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"14-minus-action.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"Pro pálkaře mohou být extra vstupy až 3 (jedna situace na každé metě). Pokud se rozhodnete je znovu odstranit, musíte začít od posledního (je povoleno pouze poslední tlačítko \"-\"). Pokud vyberete rozehru, která má za následek aut, celý podstrom dalších vstupů zmizí."],["p",{},"Počet možných extra vstupů pro běžce logicky klesá, jak se domácí meta blíží (0-2 pro 1. metu, 0-1 pro 2. metu a žádný pro 3. metu, protože první akce již posunula tohoto běžce domů). Soubor bude exportován ve formátu ",["code",{},".json"],". Rozehry mohou být exportovány kdykoli, bez ohledu na jejich platnost."],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"16-export.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"Použitím fialového tlačítka \"Importovat se souboru\" můžete nahrát dříve exportovaný soubor ",["code",{},".json"],". Pokud je to platný soubor, bude analyzován a převeden do odpovídajícího vstupního výběru a situace bude znovu vygenerována. Může být aktivována chyba validace."],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"17-import.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"S posledním fialovým tlačítkem \"Importovat z knihovny\" můžete vybírat z naší neustále rostoucí kolekce připravených situací. Tato funkce je určena k urychlení procesu generování nových obrázků, pokud je to potřeba, a na pomoc novým uživatelům lépe pochopit, čeho všeho je možné dosáhnout."],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"18-import-lib.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"nápověda-kprogramu","depth":2,"text":"NÁPOVĚDA K PROGRAMU"},{"id":"ovládání","depth":2,"text":"OVLÁDÁNÍ","children":[{"id":"základy","depth":3,"text":"Základy"},{"id":"zadání-první-rozehry","depth":3,"text":"Zadání první rozehry"},{"id":"pokročilé-běžci","depth":3,"text":"Pokročilé – Běžci"},{"id":"pokročilé-extra-vstupy","depth":3,"text":"Pokročilé – Extra vstupy"},{"id":"pokročilé-resetování-formuláře","depth":3,"text":"Pokročilé – Resetování formuláře"},{"id":"pokročilé-výběr-pro-importexport","depth":3,"text":"Pokročilé – Výběr pro import/export"}]}]}}', '', 'md', '{}', 'true', '/cs/help', '{"description":""}', 'cs/help', 'FaKv0qlC_a_Tkz4mnN6M9ussys1sfjUoMYysxUlGCi4'); -- FaKv0qlC_a_Tkz4mnN6M9ussys1sfjUoMYysxUlGCi4

INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/cs/project.md', 'Project', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"popis-projektu"},"POPIS PROJEKTU"],["p",{},["strong",{},"WBSC-like Scoring Creator"]," je JavaScriptový program, který umožňuje zadávání herních kombinací, které se mohou vyskytnout v baseballu/softballu, aby vizualizoval způsob zapsání takové rozehry v systému zápisu podle ",["a",{"href":"https://www.wbsc.org/","rel":["nofollow"]},"WBSC"],". Je určen jak pro individuální zapisovatele k učení a opakování, tak pro lektory, jimž může pomoct sestavit výukové materiály pro semináře."],["p",{},"Pro více informací o tom, jak program používat, viz ",["a",{"href":"/help"},"Uživatelská příručka"],"."],["p",{},"Projekt je dobrovolně vyvíjen a udržován zkušeným zapisovatelem, který náhodou také něco ví o programování. Bude však trvat ještě dlouho, než dosáhne ideální podoby, pokud vůbec. Pokud narazíte na jakékoliv nesprávné nebo zvláštní chování nebo něco, co zde chybí a mělo by být také zahrnuto, neváhejte mě kontaktovat - buď přímo prostřednictvím ",["a",{"href":"mailto:alois.seckar%7B''@''%7Dgmail.com"},"mého emailu"]," nebo můžete použít ",["a",{"href":"https://github.com/AloisSeckar/WBSC-Scoring/issues","rel":["nofollow"]},"GitHub Issues"]," pro vytvoření nové zprávy/otázky/návrhu tam. Pokud tak učiníte, pokuste se dobře popsat váš problém, aby mohl být řešen. Pro zjištění, co se děje, jsou užitečné screenshoty. Chcete-li se dozvědět podrobnosti, můžete si přečíst ",["a",{"href":"/help"},"průvodce hlášením chyb"],"."],["p",{},"Tento program se stále vyvíjí. Navštivte ",["a",{"href":"/project#todo"},"sekci \"TODO\""]," v přehledu projektu, kde zjistíte, co ještě plánuji implementovat. Prohlédněte si ",["a",{"href":"/project#limitations"},"seznam \"Omezení\""],", abyste viděli, co v současné době určitě není možné."],["p",{},"Toto je open-source program distribuovaný pomocí ",["a",{"href":"https://unlicense.org/","rel":["nofollow"]},"UNLICENSE"],", který lze najít ",["a",{"href":"https://github.com/AloisSeckar/WBSC-Scoring","rel":["nofollow"]},"ZDE"],". Jakákoliv pomoc s dalším vývojem je vítaná, ale můžete také prostě vzít zdrojový kód a udělat s ním, co chcete."],["p",{},["a",{"id":"done"}]],["h2",{"id":"hotovo"},"HOTOVO"],["p",{},["strong",{},"co zde už můžete najít"]],["ul",{"className":["list-disc"]},["li",{},"Editor rozeher umožňující zadat téměř všechny existující situace podle nejnovější verze WBSC manuálu"],["li",{},"Stahování výsledných obrázků v PNG formátu"],["li",{},"Export/Import akcí v JSON formátu"],["li",{},"Knihovna akcí s více než 200 předdefinovanými situacemi"],["li",{},"Uživatelská příručka"],["li",{},"Český, Anglický a Italský překlad"]],["p",{},["a",{"id":"todo"}]],["h2",{"id":"seznam-to-do"},"Seznam TO-DO"],["p",{},["strong",{},"snad bude implementováno v následujících verzích"]],["ul",{"className":["list-disc"]},["li",{},"Reorganizace knihovny akcí pro větší přehlednost"],["li",{},"Překlady do dalších jazyků"],["li",{},"Informační stránky s popisem scoresheetu a způsobu zápisu střídání"],["li",{},"Více validací vstupu"],["li",{},"Opravy a úpravy výstupu kde to bude potřeba"]],["p",{},["a",{"id":"limitations"}]],["h2",{"id":"omezení"},"Omezení"],["p",{},["strong",{},"neplánuje se v dohledné době implementovat"]],["p",{},"Existuje několik oblastí systému zápisu WBSC, které tento program momentálně nepokrývá. Mohou být zahrnuty v některých budoucích verzích, ale nic neslibujeme."],["ul",{"className":["list-disc"]},["li",{},"Není možné specifikovat akce, kterými se běžci dostali na mety (kromě TIE). Skutečná akce je vždy nahrazena ",["strong",{},["span",{"style":"color: red"},"červenou hvězdičkou"]],"."],["li",{},"Není možné specifikovat pořadí pálkaře a předchozích běžců v lineupu. INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/cs/report.md', 'Report', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"hlášení-chyb"},"HLÁŠENÍ CHYB"],["p",{},["em",{},"V každém počítačovém programu je alespoň jedna chyba."]],["p",{},"Toto úsloví může být trochu přehnané, ale obecně je dost těžké udržet jakoukoliv aplikaci bezchybnou. Při vývoji \"WBSC-like Scoring\" dělám, co můžu, také mám slušnou porci automatizovaných testů s desítkami situací k prověření pokaždé, když něco přidám/změním/opravím, ale jsem si prakticky jistý, že tu pořád máme skryté chyby, které čekají na objevení. A pokud ne přímo chyby, tak může někdo z vás přijít s nějakými novými funkcemi, které mě zatím nenapadly."],["p",{},"Jsem připraven na všechny vaše podněty. INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/en/help.md', 'Help', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"using-the-program"},"USING THE PROGRAM"],["p",{},"The basic idea is pretty simple - you build up your input and when you hit \"Score play\", the outcome will be displayed in the \"Output\" section. It is designed to look like (blue) WBSC paper scoresheet to give the most precise experience of how similar action should be written down watching the game on the field. A couple of validations run above the input to avoid impossible plays or at least make them less probable."],["p",{},"There are a few premises to have in mind:"],["ul",{},["li",{},"The program always renders only ONE PLAY AT ONCE. It may consist of more situations (theoretically up to 10 separate actions), but all of them are meant to happen during the same pitch (or the same time between pitches). You cannot follow the flow of a game."],["li",{},"Due to the above runner being placed on base is indicated with a ",["span",{"style":"color: red"},"red asterisk"]," mark. This is no official scoring abbreviation, it is just to indicate there was SOME play, but we don''t cover it and don''t care about it. The only exception from this is a potential tiebreaker (TIE) run because this is an arbitrary action."],["li",{},"Batting order always starts from 1. Depending on the number of players involved, the output can show players 1-4. It is neither possible to select different initial order, nor skip some players in between."]],["h2",{"id":"controls"},"CONTROLS"],["h3",{"id":"basics"},"Basics"],["p",{},"When you enter the site, you''ll see a basic input prepared to put in batter''s action:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"01-basic-input.png","alt":"","css":"w-full sm:w-[640px]"}]],["p",{},"Underneath there is basic output form consisting of empty scoresheet element and the \"Download image\" button:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"02-basic-output.png","alt":"",":width":"200"}]],["h3",{"id":"entering-first-play"},"Entering first play"],["p",{},"You start by picking an option from the first ",["strong",{},"Action"]," combo-box containing groups of possible situations. Internally this is called a \"base action\":"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"03-base-action.png","alt":"",":width":"200"}]],["p",{},"Based on the selection the second combo-box becomes active and being filled with concrete plays. This is called a \"specific action\":"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"04-specific-action.png","alt":"",":width":"400"}]],["p",{},"The third element of every action is called ",["strong",{},"Involved"],". This means defensive player position(s) or locations on the field (in certain cases). The availability of those UI elements depends on specific action selection. For some plays there is no additional information allowed, for some there is exactly one or exactly two options. For the rest you can select 1-4. You add new inputs with green \"+P\" button and remove them with red \"-P\" button (see later). When it is not possible to add/remove inputs, the buttons are not enabled."],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"05-involved.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"Once you are ready to render the output of your play, hit the blue \"Score play\" button:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"06-generate.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"The outcome will be printed into the scoresheet:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"07-result.png","alt":""}]],["p",{},"You can download the result to preserve it either by right clicking it and pick up from the context menu or by the green \"Download image\" button:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"08-download.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["h3",{"id":"advanced-runners"},"Advanced - Runners"],["p",{},"Actions are not limited to batter only. There is a toolbar that allows you picking up which players were involved:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"09-pick-players.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"The buttons are labeled \"B\" for the batter and \"R1-R3\" for the runners starting at respective base. When any of the buttons is selected, it has red color and \"-\" before the label. Corresponding set of inputs is rendered. Buttons that are green with \"+\" before the label mean that position is currently not used. Clicking on any of the buttons will alter its state. E.g. clicking on \"+R1\" will result into:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"10-runner-input.png","alt":"","css":"w-full sm:w-[640px]"}]],["p",{},"Another click will hide it again. You can choose any combination with or without the batter and with or without the runners. The only requirement is to have at least one player selected."],["p",{},"Runner''s input is slightly different from the batter''s and there are also minor differences between the bases. The selection of base and specific actions is adjusted to show relevant plays."],["p",{},"For 1st and 2nd base. There is a \"Tiebreak\" checkbox. If it is checked, runner doesn''t appear on base with generic red asterisk, but instead the symbol TIE is used (which is how WBSC scores tiebreaker runners)."],["p",{},"For 1st, 2nd and 3rd base. There is a \"No DP\" checkbox. If it is checked and selected action resulted into an out, it is not connected with other out(s). This can be used to point out a situation where an error (writter or extempted) breaks the natural flow of the double play."],["p",{},"From the \"Base\" combo-box you pick the base that runner gains with current action. Obviously, the options are adjusted depending on which base we are currently on. If you need a runner to stay on the current base, you don''t do it here, but instead you pick \"No advance\" from the \"Action\" menu."],["p",{},"If a play resulting in a safe situation at home plate is selected, combo-box \"Run\" becomes visible. Then you pick from \"ER\" ",["em",{},"(earned run)"]," / \"UE\" ",["em",{},"(unearned run)"]," / \"TU\" ",["em",{},"(team unearned run)"]," options. This feature is here mainly to show differences between each variant. There are some basic validations, but during the game it depends on a broader context of previous plays, while here we always score just one separate action. \"Run\" is also possible for the batter, but only for \"Hit - Home run\" plays."],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"11-type-of-run.png","alt":"",":height":"150"}]],["h3",{"id":"advanced-extra-inputs"},"Advanced - Extra inputs"],["p",{},"If needed, there can be more than one situation chained together with the initial action. You can use green \"+\" button under \"Involved\" section to render new group of inputs:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"12-plus-action.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"The button is only active if the currently selected play ends up safe. The box with new inputs renders directly below:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"13-extra-input.png","alt":"",":width":"600"}]],["p",{},"If you change your mind, you hide and thus disable extra inputs with red \"-\" button:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"14-minus-action.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"For the batter there can be up to 3 extra inputs (one situation at each base). If you decide to remove them again, you have to start from the last (only the last \"-\" button is enabled). If you select a play that results into an out, the rest of the extra inputs chain disappears."],["p",{},"For the runners, the number of possible extra inputs logically decreases as the home plate is getting closer (0-2 for 1st base, 0-1 for 2nd base and none for 3rd base, as the first action already moved that runner home). The selection of actions is naturally different for the batter (becoming batter runner) and the other runners. The other functions are the same."],["h3",{"id":"advanced-reset-form"},"Advanced - Reset form"],["p",{},"You can use the yellow \"Clear\" button to quickly reset inputs into initial state with simple batter''s action input only and everything else cleared."],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"15-clear.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["h3",{"id":"advanced-importexport-input-selection"},"Advanced - Import/Export input selection"],["p",{},"You can use purple \"Export selection\" button to save the current selection and store it for later re-use. The file will be exported in ",["code",{},".json"]," format. Inputs can be exported anytime regardless of the validity."],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"16-export.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"Using the purple \"Import selection\" button you can upload a previously exported ",["code",{},".json"]," file. Providing it is a valid file, it will be parsed and transferred into corresponding input selection and the situation will be re-generated. Validation error may be triggered."],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"17-import.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"With the last purple \"Import from library\" button you can pick from our ever-growing collection of prepared situations. They are stored ",["code",{},".json"]," files, like the custom user inputs/outputs. Upon selection it will be parsed and transferred into corresponding input selection and the situation will be re-generated. This feature is meant to speed up the process of generating new images, if needed, and to help new users to better understand what is possible to achieve."],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"18-import-lib.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"using-the-program","depth":2,"text":"USING THE PROGRAM"},{"id":"controls","depth":2,"text":"CONTROLS","children":[{"id":"basics","depth":3,"text":"Basics"},{"id":"entering-first-play","depth":3,"text":"Entering first play"},{"id":"advanced-runners","depth":3,"text":"Advanced - Runners"},{"id":"advanced-extra-inputs","depth":3,"text":"Advanced - Extra inputs"},{"id":"advanced-reset-form","depth":3,"text":"Advanced - Reset form"},{"id":"advanced-importexport-input-selection","depth":3,"text":"Advanced - Import/Export input selection"}]}]}}', '', 'md', '{}', 'true', '/en/help', '{"description":""}', 'en/help', 'uAtKwUV2DMIHrnd51DxK4oV_fQu2dNEayzBSK-fV0dw'); -- uAtKwUV2DMIHrnd51DxK4oV_fQu2dNEayzBSK-fV0dw

INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/en/project.md', 'Project', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"project-description"},"PROJECT DESCRIPTION"],["p",{},["strong",{},"WBSC-like Scoring Creator"]," is a JavaScript-based program that allows selecting combination of plays that may occur in baseball/softball game to visualize the way of scoring such play in ",["a",{"href":"https://www.wbsc.org/","rel":["nofollow"]},"WBSC"]," scoring system. It is meant both for individual scorers for learning and revising and for tutors to help them build up educational materials for clinics."],["p",{},"For more information about how to use the program, see ",["a",{"href":"/help"},"User manual"],"."],["p",{},"The project is maintained and developed voluntarily by a dedicated scorer who happens to know a thing or two about programming as well. However, it will take long before it reaches ideal shape, if ever. Shall you encounter any incorrect or odd behavior or something that is missing and should be also included, don''t hesitate to contact the author - either directly via ",["a",{"href":"mailto:alois.seckar%7B''@''%7Dgmail.com"},"my email"]," or you can use ",["a",{"href":"https://github.com/AloisSeckar/WBSC-Scoring/issues","rel":["nofollow"]},"GitHub Issues"]," for creating new report/question/suggestion directly there. If you do so, try to describe your issue, so it can be addressed. Screenshots are useful to see what is happening. You may want to check our ",["a",{"href":"/help"},"reporting bugs guide"],"."],["p",{},"This program is still evolving. Visit the ",["a",{"href":"/project#todo"},"\"TODO\" section"]," in Project overview to check what is yet planned to be implemented. Refer to the ",["a",{"href":"/project#limitations"},"\"Limitations\" list"]," to see what is certainly not possible atm."],["p",{},"This is an ",["a",{"href":"https://unlicense.org/","rel":["nofollow"]},"UNLICENSE"]," open source that can be found ",["a",{"href":"https://github.com/AloisSeckar/WBSC-Scoring","rel":["nofollow"]},"HERE"],". Any help with further development would be appreciated, but you can as well take the source code and do whatever you want with it yourself."],["p",{},["a",{"id":"done"}]],["h2",{"id":"done"},"DONE"],["p",{},["strong",{},"what you can find here"]],["ul",{"className":["list-disc"]},["li",{},"Action editor capable of inserting most of existing situations according to latest version of WBSC manual"],["li",{},"Download output images as PNG"],["li",{},"Export/Import actions in JSON format"],["li",{},"Actions library with more than 200 predefined plays"],["li",{},"User manual"],["li",{},"English, Italian and Czech translation"]],["p",{},["a",{"id":"todo"}]],["h2",{"id":"to-do-list"},"TO-DO list"],["p",{},["strong",{},"hopefully will be implemented in next few releases"]],["ul",{"className":["list-disc"]},["li",{},"Reorganizing actions library for greater clarity"],["li",{},"Translations to other languages"],["li",{},"Info pages with scoresheet description and ways of marking substitutions"],["li",{},"More input validations"],["li",{},"Output corrections and fixes where necessary"]],["p",{},["a",{"id":"limitations"}]],["h2",{"id":"limitations"},"Limitations"],["p",{},["strong",{},"not planned to be implemented soon"]],["p",{},"There are several features of WBSC scoring system that are currently not covered by this program. They may be included in some future releases, but no promises."],["ul",{"className":["list-disc"]},["li",{},"It is not possible to specify actions leading to runners appearing on bases (except TIE). The actual action is always replaced with a ",["strong",{},["span",{"style":"color: red"},"red asterisk"]],"."],["li",{},"It is not possible to specify the batting order of the batter and previous runners. Output always starts from 1."],["li",{},"It is not possible to get different number of Ks and BBs than 1"],["li",{},"Actions are limited to up to 3 assists (followed by an out or an error). This is mainly to avoid practical problems with rendering more numbers."],["li",{},"No 10th player (additional outfielder) for slowpitch. However, it is quite probable this will be eventually added."],["li",{},"Not covering possible Baseball5 features. This is because Baseball5 system is very different and non-compatible. If you''re interested, here is ",["a",{"href":"https://s3-eu-west-1.amazonaws.com/static.wbsc.org/assets/cms/documents/9b129842-cb39-da53-4b67-9c4c5a86f997.pdf"},"the official WBSC document"]," covering the Baseball5 scoring system."],["li",{},"Not covering substitutions and statistical outputs. It doesn''t quite make sense to include them into the app mechanic. However, it is planned to add dedicated static articles covering these two topics."]],["p",{},["a",{"id":"history"}]],["h2",{"id":"history"},"History"],["p",{},"See ",["a",{"href":"https://github.com/AloisSeckar/WBSC-Scoring/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md","rel":["nofollow"]},"CHANGELOG"]]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"project-description","depth":2,"text":"PROJECT DESCRIPTION"},{"id":"done","depth":2,"text":"DONE"},{"id":"to-do-list","depth":2,"text":"TO-DO list"},{"id":"limitations","depth":2,"text":"Limitations"},{"id":"history","depth":2,"text":"History"}]}}', '', 'md', '{}', 'true', '/en/project', '{"description":""}', 'en/project', '1D9Rc8iCIpbSHNp_9H26q6Imo2cxIHggqDRmGrvVNLM'); -- 1D9Rc8iCIpbSHNp_9H26q6Imo2cxIHggqDRmGrvVNLM

INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/en/report.md', 'Report', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"reporting-bugs"},"REPORTING BUGS"],["p",{},["em",{},"In every computer program there is at least one bug."]],["p",{},"This saying might be a little exaggerated, but generally it is quite hard to keep any application error prone. I am doing my best developing \"WBSC-like Scoring\", also having quite solid bunch of automated tests with dozens of situations to test every time before I add/update/fix something, but basically, I am sure there are still mistakes hidden around and waiting to be discovered. And if not mistakes, then you''ll probably come up with some \"nice to have\" new features I haven''t thought about yet."],["p",{},"I am ready for all your input. Here on this page, you can find details about the reporting process."],["h2",{"id":"github-issues"},"GitHub issues"],["p",{},"GitHub provides a simple, yet sufficient bug/feature tracking system, which is being used for this project."],["p",{},"You can find all the issues related to \"WBSC-like Scoring\" ",["a",{"href":"https://github.com/AloisSeckar/WBSC-Scoring/issues","rel":["nofollow"]},"HERE"],". The default filter shows opened issues, that are known to me, but are about to be dealt with yet."],["p",{},"If you are familiar with GitHub, feel free to open a new issue on your own. I will try to address it ASAP."],["h2",{"id":"manual-reporting"},"Manual reporting"],["p",{},"If you''re not sure how to deal with GitHub, you are of course welcome traditional ways of communication."],["p",{},"The best option is to write me an email to ",["a",{"href":"mailto:alois.seckar%7B''@''%7Dgmail.com"},"alois.seckar{''@''}gmail.com"],"."],["p",{},"Alternative ways of contacting me via social media are listed ",["a",{"href":"http://alois-seckar.cz/","rel":["nofollow"]},"HERE"],"."],["h2",{"id":"what-to-include-in-the-report"},"What to include in the report?"],["p",{},"To be able to track down the issue I urge you to keep some basic structure of the reports with all the necessary details attached. Please always try to include following points:"],["h3",{"id":"what-is-wrong"},"What is wrong?"],["p",{},"A brief, yet meaningful explanation of what seems to be broken/malfunctioning."],["h3",{"id":"reproduction"},"Reproduction"],["p",{},"A sequence of user steps and interactions leading to the situation. This is important, because some things depend on the exact order of things, and I might not be able to do it the same way unless you tell me how."],["h3",{"id":"screenshots"},"Screenshots"],["p",{},"A visualization of the problem often speaks for itself. Actually, good screenshots may be worth more than the text explanation alone."],["p",{},"I would be interested in the picture of the output (to see what is wrong), but also (and MAINLY) of the inputs, because the cause may often be hidden right there. Please always try to attach them."],["h3",{"id":"console-output"},"Console output"],["p",{},"This is an advanced topic, but it can also help me a lot. If you press ",["strong",{},"F12"]," in most of the browsers (on desktop), you gain access to a thing called \"Console\". As you visit any website, the actions your browser is performing during rendering the content may manifest here. Especially when some error occurs, a red text may appear here giving hints to developers about the cause."],["p",{},"Here is an example of console output (after I picked wrong file type during importing input):"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"report-console.png","alt":"","css":"w-full md:w-[768px]"}]]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"reporting-bugs","depth":2,"text":"REPORTING BUGS"},{"id":"github-issues","depth":2,"text":"GitHub issues"},{"id":"manual-reporting","depth":2,"text":"Manual reporting"},{"id":"what-to-include-in-the-report","depth":2,"text":"What to include in the report?","children":[{"id":"what-is-wrong","depth":3,"text":"What is wrong?"},{"id":"reproduction","depth":3,"text":"Reproduction"},{"id":"screenshots","depth":3,"text":"Screenshots"},{"id":"console-output","depth":3,"text":"Console output"}]}]}}', '', 'md', '{}', 'true', '/en/report', '{"description":""}', 'en/report', 'pcGBfcix8HPBlg5X_icuZDcvL_R09bkU9tJvfvNziAk'); -- pcGBfcix8HPBlg5X_icuZDcvL_R09bkU9tJvfvNziAk

INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/it/help.md', 'Help', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"uso-del-programma"},"USO DEL PROGRAMMA"],["p",{},"L''idea di base è piuttosto semplice: componi il tuo input e quando premi \"Classifica azione\", il risultato sarà visualizzato nella sezione \"Output\". È progettato per assomigliare al ruolino (azzurro) della WBSC, per offrire l''esperienza più precisa di come un''azione simile dovrebbe essere annotata durante la visione di una partita sul campo. Sono eseguite alcune validazioni sull''input per evitare giocate impossibili o almeno renderle meno probabili."],["p",{},"Ci sono alcuni presupposti da tenere a mente:"],["ul",{},["li",{},"Il programma visualizza sempre UNA SOLA GIOCATA ALLA VOLTA. Può consistere in più situazioni (teoricamente fino a 10 azioni separate), ma tutte devono accadere durante lo stesso lancio (o nello stesso intervallo di tempo tra i lanci). Non è possibile seguire il flusso di una partita."],["li",{},"A causa di quanto sopra, il corridore posizionato in base è indicato con un ",["span",{"style":"color: red"},"asterisco rosso"],". Questa non è un''abbreviazione ufficiale di punteggio, serve solo a indicare che c''è stata UNA giocata, ma non la sappiamo e non ce ne preoccupiamo. L''unica eccezione è un corridore del tiebreak (TIE), poiché si tratta di un''azione arbitraria."],["li",{},"L''ordine di battuta inizia sempre dal 1. A seconda del numero di giocatori coinvolti, l''output può mostrare i giocatori da 1 a 4. INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/it/project.md', 'Project', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"descrizione-progetto"},"DESCRIZIONE PROGETTO"],["p",{},["strong",{},"WBSC-like Scoring Creator"]," è un programma basato su JavaScript che permette di selezionare combinazioni di azioni che possono verificarsi in una partita di baseball/softball per visualizzare il modo di segnare tale azione nel sistema di punteggio ",["a",{"href":"https://www.wbsc.org/","rel":["nofollow"]},"WBSC"],". Se dovessi incontrare un comportamento non corretto o qualcosa che manca e dovrebbe essere incluso, non esitare a contattare l''autore - direttamente tramite ",["a",{"href":"mailto:alois.seckar%7B''@''%7Dgmail.com"},"la mia email"]," o puoi utilizzare le ",["a",{"href":"https://github.com/AloisSeckar/WBSC-Scoring/issues","rel":["nofollow"]},"GitHub Issues"]," per creare nuovi report/domande/suggerimenti direttamente  da lì. INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/it/report.md', 'Report', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"segnalare-bugs"},"SEGNALARE BUGS"],["p",{},["em",{},"In ogni programma c''è almeno un bug."]],["p",{},"Questo detto potrebbe essere un po'' esagerato, ma in generale è abbastanza difficile mantenere qualsiasi applicazione priva di errori. Sto facendo del mio meglio per sviluppare \"WBSC-like Scoring\", avendo anche un bel po'' di test automatizzati con decine di situazioni da testare ogni volta prima di aggiungere/aggiornare/risolvere qualcosa, ma in generale, sono sicuro che ci siano ancora errori nascosti in giro e in attesa di essere scoperti. E se non errori, allora probabilmente verrai con alcune nuove funzionalità \"belle da avere\" che non ho ancora pensato."],["p",{},"Sono pronto per tutti i tuoi input. Il filtro predefinito mostra i problemi aperti, che sono noti a me, ma che devono ancora essere affrontati."],["p",{},"Se sei familiare con GitHub, sentiti libero di aprire una nuova segnalazione da solo. Ti prego di cercare sempre di includere i seguenti punti:"],["h3",{"id":"cosa-è-sbagliato"},"Cosa è sbagliato?"],["p",{},"Una spiegazione breve, ma significativa di ciò che sembra essere rotto/malfunzionante."],["h3",{"id":"come-riprodurlo"},"Come riprodurlo?"],["p",{},"Una sequenza di passaggi e interazioni dell''utente che portano alla situazione. Questo è importante, perché alcune cose dipendono dall''ordine esatto delle cose, e potrei non essere in grado di farlo allo stesso modo a meno che tu non mi dica come."],["h3",{"id":"screenshots"},"Screenshots"],["p",{},"Uno screenshot del problema spesso parla da solo. INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/cs/help.md', 'Help', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"nápověda-kprogramu"},"NÁPOVĚDA K PROGRAMU"],["p",{},"Základní myšlenka je jednoduchá – sestavíte svůj vstup a po stisknutí tlačítka \"Zapsat rozehru\" se zápis situace zobrazí v sekci \"Výsledek\". Ten je připraven tak, že vypadá jako (modrý) papírový scoresheet WBSC, aby byl dojem co nejbližší tomu, jako kdybyste měli zapsat totožnou akci při sledování skutečné hry. Nad vstupem běží různé validace, které znemožňují některé nesmyslné rozehry, nebo jejich zadávání alespoň omezují."],["p",{},"Je několik předpokladů, které je třeba mít na paměti:"],["ul",{},["li",{},"Program vždy vykreslí POUZE JEDNU ROZEHRU. Může sestávat z více situací (teoreticky až 10 samostatných akcí), ale všechny se musí stát během jednoho nadhozu (nebo během času mezi dvěma nadhozy). Není možné sledovat průběh celého zápasu."],["li",{},"Kvůli výše uvedenému jsou umístění běžce na metu označena ",["span",{"style":"color: red"},"červenou hvězdičkou"],". Toto není žádná oficiální zkratka pro zápis, tím pouze dáváme najevo, že se předtím stala NĚJAKÁ situace, díky které je běžec na metě, z níž začíná. Akci nechceme zapisovat a nestaráme se o ni. Jedinou výjimkou je běžec v tie-breaku (TIE), protože to je speciální a předem daná situace."],["li",{},"Pálkařské pořadí začíná vždy od 1. INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/en/help.md', 'Help', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"using-the-program"},"USING THE PROGRAM"],["p",{},"The basic idea is pretty simple - you build up your input and when you hit \"Score play\", the outcome will be displayed in the \"Output\" section. It is designed to look like (blue) WBSC paper scoresheet to give the most precise experience of how similar action should be written down watching the game on the field. A couple of validations run above the input to avoid impossible plays or at least make them less probable."],["p",{},"There are a few premises to have in mind:"],["ul",{},["li",{},"The program always renders only ONE PLAY AT ONCE. It may consist of more situations (theoretically up to 10 separate actions), but all of them are meant to happen during the same pitch (or the same time between pitches). You cannot follow the flow of a game."],["li",{},"Due to the above runner being placed on base is indicated with a ",["span",{"style":"color: red"},"red asterisk"]," mark. This is no official scoring abbreviation, it is just to indicate there was SOME play, but we don''t cover it and don''t care about it. The only exception from this is a potential tiebreaker (TIE) run because this is an arbitrary action."],["li",{},"Batting order always starts from 1. Depending on the number of players involved, the output can show players 1-4. It is neither possible to select different initial order, nor skip some players in between."]],["h2",{"id":"controls"},"CONTROLS"],["h3",{"id":"basics"},"Basics"],["p",{},"When you enter the site, you''ll see a basic input prepared to put in batter''s action:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"01-basic-input.png","alt":"","css":"w-full sm:w-[640px]"}]],["p",{},"Underneath there is basic output form consisting of empty scoresheet element and the \"Download image\" button:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"02-basic-output.png","alt":"",":width":"200"}]],["h3",{"id":"entering-first-play"},"Entering first play"],["p",{},"You start by picking an option from the first ",["strong",{},"Action"]," combo-box containing groups of possible situations. Internally this is called a \"base action\":"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"03-base-action.png","alt":"",":width":"200"}]],["p",{},"Based on the selection the second combo-box becomes active and being filled with concrete plays. This is called a \"specific action\":"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"04-specific-action.png","alt":"",":width":"400"}]],["p",{},"The third element of every action is called ",["strong",{},"Involved"],". This means defensive player position(s) or locations on the field (in certain cases). The availability of those UI elements depends on specific action selection. For some plays there is no additional information allowed, for some there is exactly one or exactly two options. For the rest you can select 1-4. You add new inputs with green \"+P\" button and remove them with red \"-P\" button (see later). When it is not possible to add/remove inputs, the buttons are not enabled."],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"05-involved.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"Once you are ready to render the output of your play, hit the blue \"Score play\" button:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"06-generate.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"The outcome will be printed into the scoresheet:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"07-result.png","alt":""}]],["p",{},"You can download the result to preserve it either by right clicking it and pick up from the context menu or by the green \"Download image\" button:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"08-download.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["h3",{"id":"advanced-runners"},"Advanced - Runners"],["p",{},"Actions are not limited to batter only. There is a toolbar that allows you picking up which players were involved:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"09-pick-players.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"The buttons are labeled \"B\" for the batter and \"R1-R3\" for the runners starting at respective base. When any of the buttons is selected, it has red color and \"-\" before the label. Corresponding set of inputs is rendered. Buttons that are green with \"+\" before the label mean that position is currently not used. Clicking on any of the buttons will alter its state. E.g. clicking on \"+R1\" will result into:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"10-runner-input.png","alt":"","css":"w-full sm:w-[640px]"}]],["p",{},"Another click will hide it again. You can choose any combination with or without the batter and with or without the runners. The only requirement is to have at least one player selected."],["p",{},"Runner''s input is slightly different from the batter''s and there are also minor differences between the bases. The selection of base and specific actions is adjusted to show relevant plays."],["p",{},"For 1st and 2nd base. There is a \"Tiebreak\" checkbox. If it is checked, runner doesn''t appear on base with generic red asterisk, but instead the symbol TIE is used (which is how WBSC scores tiebreaker runners)."],["p",{},"For 1st, 2nd and 3rd base. There is a \"No DP\" checkbox. If it is checked and selected action resulted into an out, it is not connected with other out(s). This can be used to point out a situation where an error (writter or extempted) breaks the natural flow of the double play."],["p",{},"From the \"Base\" combo-box you pick the base that runner gains with current action. Obviously, the options are adjusted depending on which base we are currently on. If you need a runner to stay on the current base, you don''t do it here, but instead you pick \"No advance\" from the \"Action\" menu."],["p",{},"If a play resulting in a safe situation at home plate is selected, combo-box \"Run\" becomes visible. Then you pick from \"ER\" ",["em",{},"(earned run)"]," / \"UE\" ",["em",{},"(unearned run)"]," / \"TU\" ",["em",{},"(team unearned run)"]," options. This feature is here mainly to show differences between each variant. There are some basic validations, but during the game it depends on a broader context of previous plays, while here we always score just one separate action. \"Run\" is also possible for the batter, but only for \"Hit - Home run\" plays."],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"11-type-of-run.png","alt":"",":height":"150"}]],["h3",{"id":"advanced-extra-inputs"},"Advanced - Extra inputs"],["p",{},"If needed, there can be more than one situation chained together with the initial action. You can use green \"+\" button under \"Involved\" section to render new group of inputs:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"12-plus-action.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"The button is only active if the currently selected play ends up safe. The box with new inputs renders directly below:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"13-extra-input.png","alt":"",":width":"600"}]],["p",{},"If you change your mind, you hide and thus disable extra inputs with red \"-\" button:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"14-minus-action.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"For the batter there can be up to 3 extra inputs (one situation at each base). If you decide to remove them again, you have to start from the last (only the last \"-\" button is enabled). If you select a play that results into an out, the rest of the extra inputs chain disappears."],["p",{},"For the runners, the number of possible extra inputs logically decreases as the home plate is getting closer (0-2 for 1st base, 0-1 for 2nd base and none for 3rd base, as the first action already moved that runner home). The selection of actions is naturally different for the batter (becoming batter runner) and the other runners. The other functions are the same."],["h3",{"id":"advanced-reset-form"},"Advanced - Reset form"],["p",{},"You can use the yellow \"Clear\" button to quickly reset inputs into initial state with simple batter''s action input only and everything else cleared."],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"15-clear.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["h3",{"id":"advanced-importexport-input-selection"},"Advanced - Import/Export input selection"],["p",{},"You can use purple \"Export selection\" button to save the current selection and store it for later re-use. The file will be exported in ",["code",{},".json"]," format. Inputs can be exported anytime regardless of the validity."],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"16-export.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"Using the purple \"Import selection\" button you can upload a previously exported ",["code",{},".json"]," file. Providing it is a valid file, it will be parsed and transferred into corresponding input selection and the situation will be re-generated. Validation error may be triggered."],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"17-import.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"With the last purple \"Import from library\" button you can pick from our ever-growing collection of prepared situations. They are stored ",["code",{},".json"]," files, like the custom user inputs/outputs. Upon selection it will be parsed and transferred into corresponding input selection and the situation will be re-generated. This feature is meant to speed up the process of generating new images, if needed, and to help new users to better understand what is possible to achieve."],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"18-import-lib.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"using-the-program","depth":2,"text":"USING THE PROGRAM"},{"id":"controls","depth":2,"text":"CONTROLS","children":[{"id":"basics","depth":3,"text":"Basics"},{"id":"entering-first-play","depth":3,"text":"Entering first play"},{"id":"advanced-runners","depth":3,"text":"Advanced - Runners"},{"id":"advanced-extra-inputs","depth":3,"text":"Advanced - Extra inputs"},{"id":"advanced-reset-form","depth":3,"text":"Advanced - Reset form"},{"id":"advanced-importexport-input-selection","depth":3,"text":"Advanced - Import/Export input selection"}]}]}}', '', 'md', '{}', 'true', '/en/help', '{"description":""}', 'en/help', 'uAtKwUV2DMIHrnd51DxK4oV_fQu2dNEayzBSK-fV0dw'); -- uAtKwUV2DMIHrnd51DxK4oV_fQu2dNEayzBSK-fV0dw

INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/en/project.md', 'Project', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"project-description"},"PROJECT DESCRIPTION"],["p",{},["strong",{},"WBSC-like Scoring Creator"]," is a JavaScript-based program that allows selecting combination of plays that may occur in baseball/softball game to visualize the way of scoring such play in ",["a",{"href":"https://www.wbsc.org/","rel":["nofollow"]},"WBSC"]," scoring system. It is meant both for individual scorers for learning and revising and for tutors to help them build up educational materials for clinics."],["p",{},"For more information about how to use the program, see ",["a",{"href":"/help"},"User manual"],"."],["p",{},"The project is maintained and developed voluntarily by a dedicated scorer who happens to know a thing or two about programming as well. However, it will take long before it reaches ideal shape, if ever. Shall you encounter any incorrect or odd behavior or something that is missing and should be also included, don''t hesitate to contact the author - either directly via ",["a",{"href":"mailto:alois.seckar%7B''@''%7Dgmail.com"},"my email"]," or you can use ",["a",{"href":"https://github.com/AloisSeckar/WBSC-Scoring/issues","rel":["nofollow"]},"GitHub Issues"]," for creating new report/question/suggestion directly there. If you do so, try to describe your issue, so it can be addressed. Screenshots are useful to see what is happening. You may want to check our ",["a",{"href":"/help"},"reporting bugs guide"],"."],["p",{},"This program is still evolving. Visit the ",["a",{"href":"/project#todo"},"\"TODO\" section"]," in Project overview to check what is yet planned to be implemented. Refer to the ",["a",{"href":"/project#limitations"},"\"Limitations\" list"]," to see what is certainly not possible atm."],["p",{},"This is an ",["a",{"href":"https://unlicense.org/","rel":["nofollow"]},"UNLICENSE"]," open source that can be found ",["a",{"href":"https://github.com/AloisSeckar/WBSC-Scoring","rel":["nofollow"]},"HERE"],". Any help with further development would be appreciated, but you can as well take the source code and do whatever you want with it yourself."],["p",{},["a",{"id":"done"}]],["h2",{"id":"done"},"DONE"],["p",{},["strong",{},"what you can find here"]],["ul",{"className":["list-disc"]},["li",{},"Action editor capable of inserting most of existing situations according to latest version of WBSC manual"],["li",{},"Download output images as PNG"],["li",{},"Export/Import actions in JSON format"],["li",{},"Actions library with more than 200 predefined plays"],["li",{},"User manual"],["li",{},"English, Italian and Czech translation"]],["p",{},["a",{"id":"todo"}]],["h2",{"id":"to-do-list"},"TO-DO list"],["p",{},["strong",{},"hopefully will be implemented in next few releases"]],["ul",{"className":["list-disc"]},["li",{},"Reorganizing actions library for greater clarity"],["li",{},"Translations to other languages"],["li",{},"Info pages with scoresheet description and ways of marking substitutions"],["li",{},"More input validations"],["li",{},"Output corrections and fixes where necessary"]],["p",{},["a",{"id":"limitations"}]],["h2",{"id":"limitations"},"Limitations"],["p",{},["strong",{},"not planned to be implemented soon"]],["p",{},"There are several features of WBSC scoring system that are currently not covered by this program. They may be included in some future releases, but no promises."],["ul",{"className":["list-disc"]},["li",{},"It is not possible to specify actions leading to runners appearing on bases (except TIE). INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/en/report.md', 'Report', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"reporting-bugs"},"REPORTING BUGS"],["p",{},["em",{},"In every computer program there is at least one bug."]],["p",{},"This saying might be a little exaggerated, but generally it is quite hard to keep any application error prone. I am doing my best developing \"WBSC-like Scoring\", also having quite solid bunch of automated tests with dozens of situations to test every time before I add/update/fix something, but basically, I am sure there are still mistakes hidden around and waiting to be discovered. And if not mistakes, then you''ll probably come up with some \"nice to have\" new features I haven''t thought about yet."],["p",{},"I am ready for all your input. Here on this page, you can find details about the reporting process."],["h2",{"id":"github-issues"},"GitHub issues"],["p",{},"GitHub provides a simple, yet sufficient bug/feature tracking system, which is being used for this project."],["p",{},"You can find all the issues related to \"WBSC-like Scoring\" ",["a",{"href":"https://github.com/AloisSeckar/WBSC-Scoring/issues","rel":["nofollow"]},"HERE"],". The default filter shows opened issues, that are known to me, but are about to be dealt with yet."],["p",{},"If you are familiar with GitHub, feel free to open a new issue on your own. I will try to address it ASAP."],["h2",{"id":"manual-reporting"},"Manual reporting"],["p",{},"If you''re not sure how to deal with GitHub, you are of course welcome traditional ways of communication."],["p",{},"The best option is to write me an email to ",["a",{"href":"mailto:alois.seckar%7B''@''%7Dgmail.com"},"alois.seckar{''@''}gmail.com"],"."],["p",{},"Alternative ways of contacting me via social media are listed ",["a",{"href":"http://alois-seckar.cz/","rel":["nofollow"]},"HERE"],"."],["h2",{"id":"what-to-include-in-the-report"},"What to include in the report?"],["p",{},"To be able to track down the issue I urge you to keep some basic structure of the reports with all the necessary details attached. Please always try to include following points:"],["h3",{"id":"what-is-wrong"},"What is wrong?"],["p",{},"A brief, yet meaningful explanation of what seems to be broken/malfunctioning."],["h3",{"id":"reproduction"},"Reproduction"],["p",{},"A sequence of user steps and interactions leading to the situation. This is important, because some things depend on the exact order of things, and I might not be able to do it the same way unless you tell me how."],["h3",{"id":"screenshots"},"Screenshots"],["p",{},"A visualization of the problem often speaks for itself. Actually, good screenshots may be worth more than the text explanation alone."],["p",{},"I would be interested in the picture of the output (to see what is wrong), but also (and MAINLY) of the inputs, because the cause may often be hidden right there. Please always try to attach them."],["h3",{"id":"console-output"},"Console output"],["p",{},"This is an advanced topic, but it can also help me a lot. If you press ",["strong",{},"F12"]," in most of the browsers (on desktop), you gain access to a thing called \"Console\". As you visit any website, the actions your browser is performing during rendering the content may manifest here. Especially when some error occurs, a red text may appear here giving hints to developers about the cause."],["p",{},"Here is an example of console output (after I picked wrong file type during importing input):"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"report-console.png","alt":"","css":"w-full md:w-[768px]"}]]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"reporting-bugs","depth":2,"text":"REPORTING BUGS"},{"id":"github-issues","depth":2,"text":"GitHub issues"},{"id":"manual-reporting","depth":2,"text":"Manual reporting"},{"id":"what-to-include-in-the-report","depth":2,"text":"What to include in the report?","children":[{"id":"what-is-wrong","depth":3,"text":"What is wrong?"},{"id":"reproduction","depth":3,"text":"Reproduction"},{"id":"screenshots","depth":3,"text":"Screenshots"},{"id":"console-output","depth":3,"text":"Console output"}]}]}}', '', 'md', '{}', 'true', '/en/report', '{"description":""}', 'en/report', 'pcGBfcix8HPBlg5X_icuZDcvL_R09bkU9tJvfvNziAk'); -- pcGBfcix8HPBlg5X_icuZDcvL_R09bkU9tJvfvNziAk

INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/it/help.md', 'Help', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"uso-del-programma"},"USO DEL PROGRAMMA"],["p",{},"L''idea di base è piuttosto semplice: componi il tuo input e quando premi \"Classifica azione\", il risultato sarà visualizzato nella sezione \"Output\". È progettato per assomigliare al ruolino (azzurro) della WBSC, per offrire l''esperienza più precisa di come un''azione simile dovrebbe essere annotata durante la visione di una partita sul campo. Sono eseguite alcune validazioni sull''input per evitare giocate impossibili o almeno renderle meno probabili."],["p",{},"Ci sono alcuni presupposti da tenere a mente:"],["ul",{},["li",{},"Il programma visualizza sempre UNA SOLA GIOCATA ALLA VOLTA. Può consistere in più situazioni (teoricamente fino a 10 azioni separate), ma tutte devono accadere durante lo stesso lancio (o nello stesso intervallo di tempo tra i lanci). Non è possibile seguire il flusso di una partita."],["li",{},"A causa di quanto sopra, il corridore posizionato in base è indicato con un ",["span",{"style":"color: red"},"asterisco rosso"],". Questa non è un''abbreviazione ufficiale di punteggio, serve solo a indicare che c''è stata UNA giocata, ma non la sappiamo e non ce ne preoccupiamo. L''unica eccezione è un corridore del tiebreak (TIE), poiché si tratta di un''azione arbitraria."],["li",{},"L''ordine di battuta inizia sempre dal 1. A seconda del numero di giocatori coinvolti, l''output può mostrare i giocatori da 1 a 4. Non è possibile selezionare un ordine iniziale diverso, né saltare alcuni giocatori"]],["h2",{"id":"controlli"},"CONTROLLI"],["h3",{"id":"basi"},"Basi"],["p",{},"Quando entri nel sito, vedrai un input di base pronto per inserire l''azione del battitore:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"01-basic-input.png","alt":"","css":"w-full sm:w-[640px]"}]],["p",{},"Sotto c''è una forma di output di base che consiste in un blocco del ruolino vuoto e il pulsante \"Scarica immagine\":"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"02-basic-output.png","alt":"",":width":"200"}]],["h3",{"id":"inserisci-la-prima-azione"},"Inserisci la prima azione"],["p",{},"Si inizia scegliendo un''opzione dalla prima casella combinata Azione contenente gruppi di situazioni possibili. Internamente questa è chiamata una \"azione di base\":"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"03-base-action.png","alt":"",":width":"200"}]],["p",{},"In base alla selezione, la seconda casella combinata diventa attiva e viene riempita con azioni concrete. Questa è chiamata \"azione specifica\":"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"04-specific-action.png","alt":"","className":["w400"],":width":"400"}]],["p",{},"Il terzo elemento di ogni azione è chiamato ",["strong",{},"Coinvolge"],". Questo significa la posizione del difensore(i) o le posizioni sul campo (in certi casi). La disponibilità di quegli elementi UI dipende dalla selezione dell''azione specifica. Per alcune giocate non è consentita alcuna informazione aggiuntiva, per altre c''è esattamente una o esattamente due opzioni. Per il resto puoi selezionare da 1 a 4. Aggiungi nuovi input con il pulsante verde \"+P\" e rimuovili con il pulsante rosso \"-P\" (lo vedremo più in avanti). Quando non è possibile aggiungere/rimuovere input, i pulsanti non sono abilitati."],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"05-involved.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"Quando sei pronto per visualizzare il risultato della tua giocata, premi il pulsante blu \"Classifica azione\":"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"06-generate.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"L''esito verrà stampato:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"07-result.png","alt":""}]],["p",{},"Puoi scaricare il risultato per conservarlo sia facendo clic destro e scegliendo dal menu contestuale, sia premendo il pulsante verde \"Scarica immagine\":"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"08-download.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["h3",{"id":"avanzato-corridori"},"Avanzato - Corridori"],["p",{},"Le azioni non solo limitate al solo battitore. È presente un set di pulsanti per selezionare i giocatori coinvolti:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"09-pick-players.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"I pulsati conetengono \"B\" per il battitore-corridore e \"R1-R3\" per i corridori delle rispettive basi. INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/it/project.md', 'Project', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"descrizione-progetto"},"DESCRIZIONE PROGETTO"],["p",{},["strong",{},"WBSC-like Scoring Creator"]," è un programma basato su JavaScript che permette di selezionare combinazioni di azioni che possono verificarsi in una partita di baseball/softball per visualizzare il modo di segnare tale azione nel sistema di punteggio ",["a",{"href":"https://www.wbsc.org/","rel":["nofollow"]},"WBSC"],". INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/it/report.md', 'Report', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"segnalare-bugs"},"SEGNALARE BUGS"],["p",{},["em",{},"In ogni programma c''è almeno un bug."]],["p",{},"Questo detto potrebbe essere un po'' esagerato, ma in generale è abbastanza difficile mantenere qualsiasi applicazione priva di errori. Sto facendo del mio meglio per sviluppare \"WBSC-like Scoring\", avendo anche un bel po'' di test automatizzati con decine di situazioni da testare ogni volta prima di aggiungere/aggiornare/risolvere qualcosa, ma in generale, sono sicuro che ci siano ancora errori nascosti in giro e in attesa di essere scoperti. E se non errori, allora probabilmente verrai con alcune nuove funzionalità \"belle da avere\" che non ho ancora pensato."],["p",{},"Sono pronto per tutti i tuoi input. Il filtro predefinito mostra i problemi aperti, che sono noti a me, ma che devono ancora essere affrontati."],["p",{},"Se sei familiare con GitHub, sentiti libero di aprire una nuova segnalazione da solo. Ti prego di cercare sempre di includere i seguenti punti:"],["h3",{"id":"cosa-è-sbagliato"},"Cosa è sbagliato?"],["p",{},"Una spiegazione breve, ma significativa di ciò che sembra essere rotto/malfunzionante."],["h3",{"id":"come-riprodurlo"},"Come riprodurlo?"],["p",{},"Una sequenza di passaggi e interazioni dell''utente che portano alla situazione. INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/cs/help.md', 'Help', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"nápověda-kprogramu"},"NÁPOVĚDA K PROGRAMU"],["p",{},"Základní myšlenka je jednoduchá – sestavíte svůj vstup a po stisknutí tlačítka \"Zapsat rozehru\" se zápis situace zobrazí v sekci \"Výsledek\". Ten je připraven tak, že vypadá jako (modrý) papírový scoresheet WBSC, aby byl dojem co nejbližší tomu, jako kdybyste měli zapsat totožnou akci při sledování skutečné hry. Nad vstupem běží různé validace, které znemožňují některé nesmyslné rozehry, nebo jejich zadávání alespoň omezují."],["p",{},"Je několik předpokladů, které je třeba mít na paměti:"],["ul",{},["li",{},"Program vždy vykreslí POUZE JEDNU ROZEHRU. Může sestávat z více situací (teoreticky až 10 samostatných akcí), ale všechny se musí stát během jednoho nadhozu (nebo během času mezi dvěma nadhozy). Není možné sledovat průběh celého zápasu."],["li",{},"Kvůli výše uvedenému jsou umístění běžce na metu označena ",["span",{"style":"color: red"},"červenou hvězdičkou"],". Toto není žádná oficiální zkratka pro zápis, tím pouze dáváme najevo, že se předtím stala NĚJAKÁ situace, díky které je běžec na metě, z níž začíná. Akci nechceme zapisovat a nestaráme se o ni. Jedinou výjimkou je běžec v tie-breaku (TIE), protože to je speciální a předem daná situace."],["li",{},"Pálkařské pořadí začíná vždy od 1. V závislosti na počtu zúčastněných hráčů může výsledek ukazovat hráče 1-4 v pálkařském pořadí. Není však možné vybrat jiné výchozí pořadí ani přeskočit některé hráče mezi."]],["h2",{"id":"ovládání"},"OVLÁDÁNÍ"],["h3",{"id":"základy"},"Základy"],["p",{},"Když zobrazíte stránku, uvidíte základní vstup připravený k zadání akce pálkaře:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"01-basic-input.png","alt":"","css":"w-full sm:w-[640px]"}]],["p",{},"Pod tím je základní sekce pro výstup skládající se z prázdného prvku scoresheetu a tlačítka \"Stáhnout obrázek\":"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"02-basic-output.png","alt":"",":width":"200"}]],["h3",{"id":"zadání-první-rozehry"},"Zadání první rozehry"],["p",{},"Začínáte výběrem možnosti z prvního combo-boxu ",["strong",{},"Situace"],", který obsahuje skupiny možných akcí. Tomu se říká \"konkrétní (specific) akce\":"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"04-specific-action.png","alt":"",":width":"400"}]],["p",{},"Třetím prvkem každé akce je ",["strong",{},"Pozice"],". To znamená pozice hráčů v obraně nebo místa na hřišti (v určitých případech). Dostupnost těchto UI prvků závisí na výběru konkrétní akce. U některých situací není povolena žádná další informace, u některých je přesně jedna nebo přesně dvě možnosti. U ostatních můžete vybrat 1-4. INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/cs/project.md', 'Project', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"popis-projektu"},"POPIS PROJEKTU"],["p",{},["strong",{},"WBSC-like Scoring Creator"]," je JavaScriptový program, který umožňuje zadávání herních kombinací, které se mohou vyskytnout v baseballu/softballu, aby vizualizoval způsob zapsání takové rozehry v systému zápisu podle ",["a",{"href":"https://www.wbsc.org/","rel":["nofollow"]},"WBSC"],". INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/cs/report.md', 'Report', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"hlášení-chyb"},"HLÁŠENÍ CHYB"],["p",{},["em",{},"V každém počítačovém programu je alespoň jedna chyba."]],["p",{},"Toto úsloví může být trochu přehnané, ale obecně je dost těžké udržet jakoukoliv aplikaci bezchybnou. Při vývoji \"WBSC-like Scoring\" dělám, co můžu, také mám slušnou porci automatizovaných testů s desítkami situací k prověření pokaždé, když něco přidám/změním/opravím, ale jsem si prakticky jistý, že tu pořád máme skryté chyby, které čekají na objevení. A pokud ne přímo chyby, tak může někdo z vás přijít s nějakými novými funkcemi, které mě zatím nenapadly."],["p",{},"Jsem připraven na všechny vaše podněty. Na této stránce najdete detaily o procesu hlášení."],["h2",{"id":"github-issues"},"GitHub issues"],["p",{},"GitHub nabízí jednoduchý, a přitom plně dostačující systém sledování chyb/návrhů, který v tomto projektu používám."],["p",{},"Všechny tickety tykající se \"WBSC-like Scoring\" můžete nalézt ",["a",{"href":"https://github.com/AloisSeckar/WBSC-Scoring/issues","rel":["nofollow"]},"ZDE"],". Výchozí filtr ukazuje otevřené úkoly, které jsou mi známy, ale ještě je třeba je vypořádat."],["p",{},"Pokud umíte s GitHubem pracovat, neváhejte tam sami vytvořit nové hlášení. Budu se je snažit vyřídit co nejdříve."],["h2",{"id":"uživatelská-hlášení"},"Uživatelská hlášení"],["p",{},"Pokud si nejste jisti, jak pracovat s GitHubem, můžete samozřejmě použít tradiční způsoby elektronické komunikace."],["p",{},"Nejlepší způsob, jak mě zastihnout, je napsat email na ",["a",{"href":"mailto:alois.seckar%7B''@''%7Dgmail.com"},"alois.seckar{''@''}gmail.com"],"."],["p",{},"Alternativní způsoby kontaktu přes sociální sítě jsou vypsány ",["a",{"href":"http://alois-seckar.cz/","rel":["nofollow"]},"ZDE"],"."],["h2",{"id":"co-zahrnout-do-hlášení"},"Co zahrnout do hlášení?"],["p",{},"Abych byl schopen vysledovat zdroj problému, prosím vás o dodržení určité základní struktury hlášení a zahrnutí všech potřebných detailů. Prosím, zkuste vždy přidat následující body:"],["h3",{"id":"co-je-špatně"},"Co je špatně?"],["p",{},"Stručné, ale smysluplné a jasné vysvětlení, co se zdá být rozbité/špatně fungující."],["h3",{"id":"reprodukce"},"Reprodukce"],["p",{},"Sekvence uživatelských kroků a interakcí, která vedla k uvedené situaci. Toto je důležité, protože některé chyby závisí na přesném pořadí činností, a já bych nemusel být schopný je sám zopakovat, pokud mi neřeknete jak."],["h3",{"id":"snímky-obrazovky"},"Snímky obrazovky"],["p",{},"Vizualizace problému často mluví sama za sebe. Vlastně dobrý screenshot může být cennější než samotné textové vysvětlení."],["p",{},"Bude mě zajímat obrázek výstupu (abych viděl, co je špatně), ale také (a HLAVNĚ) obrázek vstupů, protože příčina může být často skryta právě zde. Prosím, vždy se je pokuste přiložit."],["h3",{"id":"výstup-konzole"},"Výstup konzole"],["p",{},"Toto je pokročilejší téma, ale také mi může hodně pomoct. Pokud ve vašem prohlížeči (na PC) zmáčknete klávesu ",["strong",{},"F12"],", většinou získáte přístup k nástroji zvanému \"Konzole\". Když navštívíte jakoukoliv stránku, akce vašeho prohlížeče probíhající během načítání obsahu se zde mohou projevit. Speciálně pokud dojde k nějaké chybě, může se zde objevit červený text, který dává vývojářům nápovědu o možné příčině."],["p",{},"Zde je příklad výstupu do konzole (poté, co jsem zvolil špatný typ souboru během importu z JSON souboru):"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"report-console.png","alt":"","css":"w-full md:w-[768px]"}]]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"hlášení-chyb","depth":2,"text":"HLÁŠENÍ CHYB"},{"id":"github-issues","depth":2,"text":"GitHub issues"},{"id":"uživatelská-hlášení","depth":2,"text":"Uživatelská hlášení"},{"id":"co-zahrnout-do-hlášení","depth":2,"text":"Co zahrnout do hlášení?","children":[{"id":"co-je-špatně","depth":3,"text":"Co je špatně?"},{"id":"reprodukce","depth":3,"text":"Reprodukce"},{"id":"snímky-obrazovky","depth":3,"text":"Snímky obrazovky"},{"id":"výstup-konzole","depth":3,"text":"Výstup konzole"}]}]}}', '', 'md', '{}', 'true', '/cs/report', '{"description":""}', 'cs/report', 'kAz4xBUzf2TCdd0Y8oZxX74Va4zt9extOBbBfD2jYhg'); -- kAz4xBUzf2TCdd0Y8oZxX74Va4zt9extOBbBfD2jYhg

INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/en/help.md', 'Help', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"using-the-program"},"USING THE PROGRAM"],["p",{},"The basic idea is pretty simple - you build up your input and when you hit \"Score play\", the outcome will be displayed in the \"Output\" section. It is designed to look like (blue) WBSC paper scoresheet to give the most precise experience of how similar action should be written down watching the game on the field. A couple of validations run above the input to avoid impossible plays or at least make them less probable."],["p",{},"There are a few premises to have in mind:"],["ul",{},["li",{},"The program always renders only ONE PLAY AT ONCE. INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/en/project.md', 'Project', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"project-description"},"PROJECT DESCRIPTION"],["p",{},["strong",{},"WBSC-like Scoring Creator"]," is a JavaScript-based program that allows selecting combination of plays that may occur in baseball/softball game to visualize the way of scoring such play in ",["a",{"href":"https://www.wbsc.org/","rel":["nofollow"]},"WBSC"]," scoring system. It is meant both for individual scorers for learning and revising and for tutors to help them build up educational materials for clinics."],["p",{},"For more information about how to use the program, see ",["a",{"href":"/help"},"User manual"],"."],["p",{},"The project is maintained and developed voluntarily by a dedicated scorer who happens to know a thing or two about programming as well. However, it will take long before it reaches ideal shape, if ever. Shall you encounter any incorrect or odd behavior or something that is missing and should be also included, don''t hesitate to contact the author - either directly via ",["a",{"href":"mailto:alois.seckar%7B''@''%7Dgmail.com"},"my email"]," or you can use ",["a",{"href":"https://github.com/AloisSeckar/WBSC-Scoring/issues","rel":["nofollow"]},"GitHub Issues"]," for creating new report/question/suggestion directly there. If you do so, try to describe your issue, so it can be addressed. Screenshots are useful to see what is happening. You may want to check our ",["a",{"href":"/help"},"reporting bugs guide"],"."],["p",{},"This program is still evolving. Visit the ",["a",{"href":"/project#todo"},"\"TODO\" section"]," in Project overview to check what is yet planned to be implemented. Refer to the ",["a",{"href":"/project#limitations"},"\"Limitations\" list"]," to see what is certainly not possible atm."],["p",{},"This is an ",["a",{"href":"https://unlicense.org/","rel":["nofollow"]},"UNLICENSE"]," open source that can be found ",["a",{"href":"https://github.com/AloisSeckar/WBSC-Scoring","rel":["nofollow"]},"HERE"],". Any help with further development would be appreciated, but you can as well take the source code and do whatever you want with it yourself."],["p",{},["a",{"id":"done"}]],["h2",{"id":"done"},"DONE"],["p",{},["strong",{},"what you can find here"]],["ul",{"className":["list-disc"]},["li",{},"Action editor capable of inserting most of existing situations according to latest version of WBSC manual"],["li",{},"Download output images as PNG"],["li",{},"Export/Import actions in JSON format"],["li",{},"Actions library with more than 200 predefined plays"],["li",{},"User manual"],["li",{},"English, Italian and Czech translation"]],["p",{},["a",{"id":"todo"}]],["h2",{"id":"to-do-list"},"TO-DO list"],["p",{},["strong",{},"hopefully will be implemented in next few releases"]],["ul",{"className":["list-disc"]},["li",{},"Reorganizing actions library for greater clarity"],["li",{},"Translations to other languages"],["li",{},"Info pages with scoresheet description and ways of marking substitutions"],["li",{},"More input validations"],["li",{},"Output corrections and fixes where necessary"]],["p",{},["a",{"id":"limitations"}]],["h2",{"id":"limitations"},"Limitations"],["p",{},["strong",{},"not planned to be implemented soon"]],["p",{},"There are several features of WBSC scoring system that are currently not covered by this program. INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/en/report.md', 'Report', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"reporting-bugs"},"REPORTING BUGS"],["p",{},["em",{},"In every computer program there is at least one bug."]],["p",{},"This saying might be a little exaggerated, but generally it is quite hard to keep any application error prone. I am doing my best developing \"WBSC-like Scoring\", also having quite solid bunch of automated tests with dozens of situations to test every time before I add/update/fix something, but basically, I am sure there are still mistakes hidden around and waiting to be discovered. And if not mistakes, then you''ll probably come up with some \"nice to have\" new features I haven''t thought about yet."],["p",{},"I am ready for all your input. Here on this page, you can find details about the reporting process."],["h2",{"id":"github-issues"},"GitHub issues"],["p",{},"GitHub provides a simple, yet sufficient bug/feature tracking system, which is being used for this project."],["p",{},"You can find all the issues related to \"WBSC-like Scoring\" ",["a",{"href":"https://github.com/AloisSeckar/WBSC-Scoring/issues","rel":["nofollow"]},"HERE"],". The default filter shows opened issues, that are known to me, but are about to be dealt with yet."],["p",{},"If you are familiar with GitHub, feel free to open a new issue on your own. I will try to address it ASAP."],["h2",{"id":"manual-reporting"},"Manual reporting"],["p",{},"If you''re not sure how to deal with GitHub, you are of course welcome traditional ways of communication."],["p",{},"The best option is to write me an email to ",["a",{"href":"mailto:alois.seckar%7B''@''%7Dgmail.com"},"alois.seckar{''@''}gmail.com"],"."],["p",{},"Alternative ways of contacting me via social media are listed ",["a",{"href":"http://alois-seckar.cz/","rel":["nofollow"]},"HERE"],"."],["h2",{"id":"what-to-include-in-the-report"},"What to include in the report?"],["p",{},"To be able to track down the issue I urge you to keep some basic structure of the reports with all the necessary details attached. This is important, because some things depend on the exact order of things, and I might not be able to do it the same way unless you tell me how."],["h3",{"id":"screenshots"},"Screenshots"],["p",{},"A visualization of the problem often speaks for itself. INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/it/project.md', 'Project', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"descrizione-progetto"},"DESCRIZIONE PROGETTO"],["p",{},["strong",{},"WBSC-like Scoring Creator"]," è un programma basato su JavaScript che permette di selezionare combinazioni di azioni che possono verificarsi in una partita di baseball/softball per visualizzare il modo di segnare tale azione nel sistema di punteggio ",["a",{"href":"https://www.wbsc.org/","rel":["nofollow"]},"WBSC"],". È pensato sia per i segnapunti individuali per l''apprendimento e la revisione, sia per i tutor per aiutarli a costruire materiali educativi per le riunioni/clinics."],["p",{},"Per maggiori informazioni su come utilizzare il programma, consulta il ",["a",{"href":"/help"},"Manuale utente"],"."],["p",{},"Il progetto è mantenuto e sviluppato volontariamente da uno scorer dedicato che sa anche qualcosa di programmazione. Tuttavia, ci vorrà molto tempo prima che raggiunga la forma ideale, se mai la raggiungerà. Se dovessi incontrare un comportamento non corretto o qualcosa che manca e dovrebbe essere incluso, non esitare a contattare l''autore - direttamente tramite ",["a",{"href":"mailto:alois.seckar%7B''@''%7Dgmail.com"},"la mia email"]," o puoi utilizzare le ",["a",{"href":"https://github.com/AloisSeckar/WBSC-Scoring/issues","rel":["nofollow"]},"GitHub Issues"]," per creare nuovi report/domande/suggerimenti direttamente  da lì. Potresti voler controllare la nostra ",["a",{"href":"/help"},"guida alla segnalazione dei bug"],"."],["p",{},"Questo programma è ancora in evoluzione.
