Qualsiasi aiuto per lo sviluppo futuro sarebbe apprezzato, ma puoi anche prendere il codice sorgente e fare ciò che vuoi con esso."],["p",{},["a",{"id":"done"}]],["h2",{"id":"disponibile"},"DISPONIBILE"],["p",{},["strong",{},"(cosa puoi già trovare qui)"]],["ul",{"className":["list-disc"]},["li",{},"Editor per le azioni in grado di inserire la maggior parte delle situazioni esistenti secondo l''ultimo manuale WBSC"],["li",{},"Scarica le immagini di output come PNG"],["li",{},"Esporta/Importa azioni in formato JSON"],["li",{},"Libreria azioni con più di 200 giocate predefinite"],["li",{},"Manuale utente"],["li",{},"Traduzione in inglese, ceco e italiano"]],["p",{},["a",{"id":"todo"}]],["h2",{"id":"lista-todo-da-fare"},"LISTA TODO (da fare)"],["p",{},["strong",{},"(quello che verrà implementato nelle prossime versioni)"]],["ul",{"className":["list-disc"]},["li",{},"Riconoscimento delle azioni presenti nella libreria per maggiore chiarezza"],["li",{},"Traduzioni in altre lingue"],["li",{},"Pagine informative con descrizione del punteggio e modi per segnare le sostituzioni"],["li",{},"Ulteriori validazioni degli input"],["li",{},"Correzioni e correzioni dell''output dove necessario"]],["p",{},["a",{"id":"limitations"}]],["h2",{"id":"limitazioni"},"Limitazioni"],["p",{},["strong",{},"(non pianificato per il prossino futuro)"]],["p",{},"Ci sono diverse situazioni del sistema di scoring WBSC che attualmente non sono coperte da questo programma. INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/it/report.md', 'Report', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"segnalare-bugs"},"SEGNALARE BUGS"],["p",{},["em",{},"In ogni programma c''è almeno un bug."]],["p",{},"Questo detto potrebbe essere un po'' esagerato, ma in generale è abbastanza difficile mantenere qualsiasi applicazione priva di errori. Sto facendo del mio meglio per sviluppare \"WBSC-like Scoring\", avendo anche un bel po'' di test automatizzati con decine di situazioni da testare ogni volta prima di aggiungere/aggiornare/risolvere qualcosa, ma in generale, sono sicuro che ci siano ancora errori nascosti in giro e in attesa di essere scoperti. E se non errori, allora probabilmente verrai con alcune nuove funzionalità \"belle da avere\" che non ho ancora pensato."],["p",{},"Sono pronto per tutti i tuoi input. Qui su questa pagina, puoi trovare dettagli sul processo di segnalazione."],["h2",{"id":"github-issues"},"GitHub issues"],["p",{},"GitHub fornisce un sistema di tracciamento dei bug/feature semplice, ma sufficiente, che viene utilizzato per questo progetto."],["p",{},"Puoi trovare tutte le segnalazioni relativi a \"WBSC-like Scoring\" ",["a",{"href":"https://github.com/AloisSeckar/WBSC-Scoring/issues","rel":["nofollow"]},"QUI"],". Il filtro predefinito mostra i problemi aperti, che sono noti a me, ma che devono ancora essere affrontati."],["p",{},"Se sei familiare con GitHub, sentiti libero di aprire una nuova segnalazione da solo. Cercherò di affontarla il prima possibile"],["h2",{"id":"report-manuale"},"Report manuale"],["p",{},"Se non sei sicuro di come gestire GitHub, sei naturalmente il benvenuto usanto i modi tradizionali di comunicazione."],["p",{},"La migliore opzione è scrivermi una email a ",["a",{"href":"mailto:alois.seckar%7B''@''%7Dgmail.com"},"alois.seckar{''@''}gmail.com"],"."],["p",{},"Altre modalità di contatto tramite social media sono elencate ",["a",{"href":"http://alois-seckar.cz/","rel":["nofollow"]},"QUI"],"."],["h2",{"id":"cosa-includere-nella-segnalazione"},"Cosa includere nella segnalazione?"],["p",{},"Per poter individuare il problema, ti consiglio di mantenere una struttura di base dei report con tutti i dettagli necessari allegati. Ti prego di cercare sempre di includere i seguenti punti:"],["h3",{"id":"cosa-è-sbagliato"},"Cosa è sbagliato?"],["p",{},"Una spiegazione breve, ma significativa di ciò che sembra essere rotto/malfunzionante."],["h3",{"id":"come-riprodurlo"},"Come riprodurlo?"],["p",{},"Una sequenza di passaggi e interazioni dell''utente che portano alla situazione. Questo è importante, perché alcune cose dipendono dall''ordine esatto delle cose, e potrei non essere in grado di farlo allo stesso modo a meno che tu non mi dica come."],["h3",{"id":"screenshots"},"Screenshots"],["p",{},"Uno screenshot del problema spesso parla da solo. In realtà, buoni screenshot possono valere più della sola spiegazione testuale."],["p",{},"Sarei interessato alla foto dell''output (per vedere cosa non va), ma anche (e SOPRATTUTTO) degli input, perché la causa può spesso essere nascosta proprio lì. Ti prego di provare ad allegarli sempre."],["h3",{"id":"console-output"},"Console output"],["p",{},"Questo è un argomento avanzato ma può anche aiutarmi molto. Se premi ",["strong",{},"F12"]," nella maggior parte dei browser (su desktop), ottieni accesso a una cosa chiamata \"Console\". Mentre visiti qualsiasi sito web, le azioni che il tuo browser sta eseguendo durante il rendering del contenuto possono manifestarsi qui. Specialmente quando si verifica un errore, un testo rosso può apparire qui dando suggerimenti agli sviluppatori sulla causa."],["p",{},"Ecco un esempio di output della console (dopo aver scelto il tipo di file sbagliato durante l''importazione dell''input):"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"report-console.png","alt":"","css":"w-full md:w-[768px]"}]]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"segnalare-bugs","depth":2,"text":"SEGNALARE BUGS"},{"id":"github-issues","depth":2,"text":"GitHub issues"},{"id":"report-manuale","depth":2,"text":"Report manuale"},{"id":"cosa-includere-nella-segnalazione","depth":2,"text":"Cosa includere nella segnalazione?","children":[{"id":"cosa-è-sbagliato","depth":3,"text":"Cosa è sbagliato?"},{"id":"come-riprodurlo","depth":3,"text":"Come riprodurlo?"},{"id":"screenshots","depth":3,"text":"Screenshots"},{"id":"console-output","depth":3,"text":"Console output"}]}]}}', '', 'md', '{}', 'true', '/it/report', '{"description":""}', 'it/report', 'WPPQHL6O38aOzQVUJ5btV81ceDPrv4GUByF6HU1NkmI'); -- WPPQHL6O38aOzQVUJ5btV81ceDPrv4GUByF6HU1NkmI

INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/cs/help.md', 'Help', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"nápověda-kprogramu"},"NÁPOVĚDA K PROGRAMU"],["p",{},"Základní myšlenka je jednoduchá – sestavíte svůj vstup a po stisknutí tlačítka \"Zapsat rozehru\" se zápis situace zobrazí v sekci \"Výsledek\". Ten je připraven tak, že vypadá jako (modrý) papírový scoresheet WBSC, aby byl dojem co nejbližší tomu, jako kdybyste měli zapsat totožnou akci při sledování skutečné hry. Nad vstupem běží různé validace, které znemožňují některé nesmyslné rozehry, nebo jejich zadávání alespoň omezují."],["p",{},"Je několik předpokladů, které je třeba mít na paměti:"],["ul",{},["li",{},"Program vždy vykreslí POUZE JEDNU ROZEHRU. Může sestávat z více situací (teoreticky až 10 samostatných akcí), ale všechny se musí stát během jednoho nadhozu (nebo během času mezi dvěma nadhozy). Není možné sledovat průběh celého zápasu."],["li",{},"Kvůli výše uvedenému jsou umístění běžce na metu označena ",["span",{"style":"color: red"},"červenou hvězdičkou"],". Toto není žádná oficiální zkratka pro zápis, tím pouze dáváme najevo, že se předtím stala NĚJAKÁ situace, díky které je běžec na metě, z níž začíná. Akci nechceme zapisovat a nestaráme se o ni. Jedinou výjimkou je běžec v tie-breaku (TIE), protože to je speciální a předem daná situace."],["li",{},"Pálkařské pořadí začíná vždy od 1. V závislosti na počtu zúčastněných hráčů může výsledek ukazovat hráče 1-4 v pálkařském pořadí. Není však možné vybrat jiné výchozí pořadí ani přeskočit některé hráče mezi."]],["h2",{"id":"ovládání"},"OVLÁDÁNÍ"],["h3",{"id":"základy"},"Základy"],["p",{},"Když zobrazíte stránku, uvidíte základní vstup připravený k zadání akce pálkaře:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"01-basic-input.png","alt":"","css":"w-full sm:w-[640px]"}]],["p",{},"Pod tím je základní sekce pro výstup skládající se z prázdného prvku scoresheetu a tlačítka \"Stáhnout obrázek\":"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"02-basic-output.png","alt":"",":width":"200"}]],["h3",{"id":"zadání-první-rozehry"},"Zadání první rozehry"],["p",{},"Začínáte výběrem možnosti z prvního combo-boxu ",["strong",{},"Situace"],", který obsahuje skupiny možných akcí. Interně se tomu říká \"základní (base) akce\":"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"03-base-action.png","alt":"",":width":"200"}]],["p",{},"Na základě výběru se aktivuje druhý combo-box a je naplněn odpovídajícím seznamem možných variant. Tomu se říká \"konkrétní (specific) akce\":"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"04-specific-action.png","alt":"",":width":"400"}]],["p",{},"Třetím prvkem každé akce je ",["strong",{},"Pozice"],". To znamená pozice hráčů v obraně nebo místa na hřišti (v určitých případech). Dostupnost těchto UI prvků závisí na výběru konkrétní akce. U některých situací není povolena žádná další informace, u některých je přesně jedna nebo přesně dvě možnosti. U ostatních můžete vybrat 1-4. Nové vstupy přidáte tlačítkem zelené \"+P\" a odstraníte je tlačítkem červené \"-P\" (viz dále). Pokud není možné přidat/odstranit vstupy, tlačítka nejsou aktivní."],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"05-involved.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"Jakmile jste připraveni nechat vykreslit výstup své rozehry, stiskněte modré tlačítko \"Zapsat rozehru\":"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"06-generate.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"Výsledek bude vykreslen do scoresheetu:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"07-result.png","alt":"",":width":"200"}]],["p",{},"Hotový obrázek si můžete stáhnout a uložit buď kliknutím pravým tlačítkem a výběrem z kontextového menu, nebo zeleným tlačítkem \"Stáhnout obrázek\":"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"08-download.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["h3",{"id":"pokročilé-běžci"},"Pokročilé – Běžci"],["p",{},"Akce nejsou omezeny jen na pálkaře. K dispozici je toolbar, který vám umožňuje vybrat, kteří hráči se do rozehry zapojili:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"09-pick-players.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"Tlačítka jsou označena \"B\" pro pálkaře (batter) a \"R1-R3\" pro běžce (runner), kteří startují na příslušné metě. Když je kterékoli z tlačítek vybráno, má červenou barvu a \"-\" před označením. Je vykreslen příslušný set vstupů. Zelená tlačítka s \"+\" před označením znamenají, že tato pozice se aktuálně nepoužívá. Kliknutím na kterékoli z tlačítek se změní jeho stav. Například kliknutím na \"+R1\" má za následek:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"10-runner-input.png","alt":"","css":"w-full sm:w-[640px]"}]],["p",{},"Další kliknutí vstupy znovu skryje. Můžete zvolit jakoukoli kombinaci s nebo bez pálkaře a s nebo bez běžců. Jediným požadavkem je mít vybraného alespoň jednoho hráče."],["p",{},"Vstup běžce je mírně odlišný od vstupu pálkaře a mezi metami jsou také drobné rozdíly. Výběr mety a konkrétních akcí je upraven tak, aby zobrazoval relevantní situace."],["p",{},"Pro 1. a 2. metu existuje zaškrtávací políčko \"Tiebreak\". Pokud je zaškrtnuto, běžec se na metě neobjevuje s obecnou červenou hvězdičkou, ale místo toho se používá symbol TIE (což je způsob, jak WBSC zápis zaznamenává běžce v tiebreaku)."],["p",{},"For 1., 2. a 3. metu existuje zaškrtávací políčko \"No DP\". Pokud je zaškrtnuto a vybraná rozehra má za následek aut, nebude propojen s dalším autem (či auty). To lze využít pro situaci, kdy v důsledku chyby (zapsané či skryté (extempted)) dojde k rozbití přirozeného flow double play hry."],["p",{},"Z rozevírací nabídky \"Meta\" vybíráte metu, u které probíhá aktuální akce běžce. INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/cs/project.md', 'Project', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"popis-projektu"},"POPIS PROJEKTU"],["p",{},["strong",{},"WBSC-like Scoring Creator"]," je JavaScriptový program, který umožňuje zadávání herních kombinací, které se mohou vyskytnout v baseballu/softballu, aby vizualizoval způsob zapsání takové rozehry v systému zápisu podle ",["a",{"href":"https://www.wbsc.org/","rel":["nofollow"]},"WBSC"],". INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/cs/report.md', 'Report', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"hlášení-chyb"},"HLÁŠENÍ CHYB"],["p",{},["em",{},"V každém počítačovém programu je alespoň jedna chyba."]],["p",{},"Toto úsloví může být trochu přehnané, ale obecně je dost těžké udržet jakoukoliv aplikaci bezchybnou. Při vývoji \"WBSC-like Scoring\" dělám, co můžu, také mám slušnou porci automatizovaných testů s desítkami situací k prověření pokaždé, když něco přidám/změním/opravím, ale jsem si prakticky jistý, že tu pořád máme skryté chyby, které čekají na objevení. A pokud ne přímo chyby, tak může někdo z vás přijít s nějakými novými funkcemi, které mě zatím nenapadly."],["p",{},"Jsem připraven na všechny vaše podněty. Na této stránce najdete detaily o procesu hlášení."],["h2",{"id":"github-issues"},"GitHub issues"],["p",{},"GitHub nabízí jednoduchý, a přitom plně dostačující systém sledování chyb/návrhů, který v tomto projektu používám."],["p",{},"Všechny tickety tykající se \"WBSC-like Scoring\" můžete nalézt ",["a",{"href":"https://github.com/AloisSeckar/WBSC-Scoring/issues","rel":["nofollow"]},"ZDE"],". Výchozí filtr ukazuje otevřené úkoly, které jsou mi známy, ale ještě je třeba je vypořádat."],["p",{},"Pokud umíte s GitHubem pracovat, neváhejte tam sami vytvořit nové hlášení. Budu se je snažit vyřídit co nejdříve."],["h2",{"id":"uživatelská-hlášení"},"Uživatelská hlášení"],["p",{},"Pokud si nejste jisti, jak pracovat s GitHubem, můžete samozřejmě použít tradiční způsoby elektronické komunikace."],["p",{},"Nejlepší způsob, jak mě zastihnout, je napsat email na ",["a",{"href":"mailto:alois.seckar%7B''@''%7Dgmail.com"},"alois.seckar{''@''}gmail.com"],"."],["p",{},"Alternativní způsoby kontaktu přes sociální sítě jsou vypsány ",["a",{"href":"http://alois-seckar.cz/","rel":["nofollow"]},"ZDE"],"."],["h2",{"id":"co-zahrnout-do-hlášení"},"Co zahrnout do hlášení?"],["p",{},"Abych byl schopen vysledovat zdroj problému, prosím vás o dodržení určité základní struktury hlášení a zahrnutí všech potřebných detailů. Prosím, zkuste vždy přidat následující body:"],["h3",{"id":"co-je-špatně"},"Co je špatně?"],["p",{},"Stručné, ale smysluplné a jasné vysvětlení, co se zdá být rozbité/špatně fungující."],["h3",{"id":"reprodukce"},"Reprodukce"],["p",{},"Sekvence uživatelských kroků a interakcí, která vedla k uvedené situaci. Toto je důležité, protože některé chyby závisí na přesném pořadí činností, a já bych nemusel být schopný je sám zopakovat, pokud mi neřeknete jak."],["h3",{"id":"snímky-obrazovky"},"Snímky obrazovky"],["p",{},"Vizualizace problému často mluví sama za sebe. Vlastně dobrý screenshot může být cennější než samotné textové vysvětlení."],["p",{},"Bude mě zajímat obrázek výstupu (abych viděl, co je špatně), ale také (a HLAVNĚ) obrázek vstupů, protože příčina může být často skryta právě zde. Prosím, vždy se je pokuste přiložit."],["h3",{"id":"výstup-konzole"},"Výstup konzole"],["p",{},"Toto je pokročilejší téma, ale také mi může hodně pomoct. Pokud ve vašem prohlížeči (na PC) zmáčknete klávesu ",["strong",{},"F12"],", většinou získáte přístup k nástroji zvanému \"Konzole\". Když navštívíte jakoukoliv stránku, akce vašeho prohlížeče probíhající během načítání obsahu se zde mohou projevit. Speciálně pokud dojde k nějaké chybě, může se zde objevit červený text, který dává vývojářům nápovědu o možné příčině."],["p",{},"Zde je příklad výstupu do konzole (poté, co jsem zvolil špatný typ souboru během importu z JSON souboru):"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"report-console.png","alt":"","css":"w-full md:w-[768px]"}]]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"hlášení-chyb","depth":2,"text":"HLÁŠENÍ CHYB"},{"id":"github-issues","depth":2,"text":"GitHub issues"},{"id":"uživatelská-hlášení","depth":2,"text":"Uživatelská hlášení"},{"id":"co-zahrnout-do-hlášení","depth":2,"text":"Co zahrnout do hlášení?","children":[{"id":"co-je-špatně","depth":3,"text":"Co je špatně?"},{"id":"reprodukce","depth":3,"text":"Reprodukce"},{"id":"snímky-obrazovky","depth":3,"text":"Snímky obrazovky"},{"id":"výstup-konzole","depth":3,"text":"Výstup konzole"}]}]}}', '', 'md', '{}', 'true', '/cs/report', '{"description":""}', 'cs/report', 'kAz4xBUzf2TCdd0Y8oZxX74Va4zt9extOBbBfD2jYhg'); -- kAz4xBUzf2TCdd0Y8oZxX74Va4zt9extOBbBfD2jYhg

INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/en/help.md', 'Help', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"using-the-program"},"USING THE PROGRAM"],["p",{},"The basic idea is pretty simple - you build up your input and when you hit \"Score play\", the outcome will be displayed in the \"Output\" section. It is designed to look like (blue) WBSC paper scoresheet to give the most precise experience of how similar action should be written down watching the game on the field. A couple of validations run above the input to avoid impossible plays or at least make them less probable."],["p",{},"There are a few premises to have in mind:"],["ul",{},["li",{},"The program always renders only ONE PLAY AT ONCE. It may consist of more situations (theoretically up to 10 separate actions), but all of them are meant to happen during the same pitch (or the same time between pitches). You cannot follow the flow of a game."],["li",{},"Due to the above runner being placed on base is indicated with a ",["span",{"style":"color: red"},"red asterisk"]," mark. This is no official scoring abbreviation, it is just to indicate there was SOME play, but we don''t cover it and don''t care about it. The only exception from this is a potential tiebreaker (TIE) run because this is an arbitrary action."],["li",{},"Batting order always starts from 1. Depending on the number of players involved, the output can show players 1-4. It is neither possible to select different initial order, nor skip some players in between."]],["h2",{"id":"controls"},"CONTROLS"],["h3",{"id":"basics"},"Basics"],["p",{},"When you enter the site, you''ll see a basic input prepared to put in batter''s action:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"01-basic-input.png","alt":"","css":"w-full sm:w-[640px]"}]],["p",{},"Underneath there is basic output form consisting of empty scoresheet element and the \"Download image\" button:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"02-basic-output.png","alt":"",":width":"200"}]],["h3",{"id":"entering-first-play"},"Entering first play"],["p",{},"You start by picking an option from the first ",["strong",{},"Action"]," combo-box containing groups of possible situations. Internally this is called a \"base action\":"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"03-base-action.png","alt":"",":width":"200"}]],["p",{},"Based on the selection the second combo-box becomes active and being filled with concrete plays. This is called a \"specific action\":"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"04-specific-action.png","alt":"",":width":"400"}]],["p",{},"The third element of every action is called ",["strong",{},"Involved"],". This means defensive player position(s) or locations on the field (in certain cases). The availability of those UI elements depends on specific action selection. For some plays there is no additional information allowed, for some there is exactly one or exactly two options. For the rest you can select 1-4. You add new inputs with green \"+P\" button and remove them with red \"-P\" button (see later). When it is not possible to add/remove inputs, the buttons are not enabled."],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"05-involved.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"Once you are ready to render the output of your play, hit the blue \"Score play\" button:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"06-generate.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"The outcome will be printed into the scoresheet:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"07-result.png","alt":""}]],["p",{},"You can download the result to preserve it either by right clicking it and pick up from the context menu or by the green \"Download image\" button:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"08-download.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["h3",{"id":"advanced-runners"},"Advanced - Runners"],["p",{},"Actions are not limited to batter only. There is a toolbar that allows you picking up which players were involved:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"09-pick-players.png","alt":"",":height":"40"}]],["p",{},"The buttons are labeled \"B\" for the batter and \"R1-R3\" for the runners starting at respective base. When any of the buttons is selected, it has red color and \"-\" before the label. Corresponding set of inputs is rendered. Buttons that are green with \"+\" before the label mean that position is currently not used. Clicking on any of the buttons will alter its state. E.g. clicking on \"+R1\" will result into:"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"10-runner-input.png","alt":"","css":"w-full sm:w-[640px]"}]],["p",{},"Another click will hide it again. You can choose any combination with or without the batter and with or without the runners. INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/en/project.md', 'Project', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"project-description"},"PROJECT DESCRIPTION"],["p",{},["strong",{},"WBSC-like Scoring Creator"]," is a JavaScript-based program that allows selecting combination of plays that may occur in baseball/softball game to visualize the way of scoring such play in ",["a",{"href":"https://www.wbsc.org/","rel":["nofollow"]},"WBSC"]," scoring system. It is meant both for individual scorers for learning and revising and for tutors to help them build up educational materials for clinics."],["p",{},"For more information about how to use the program, see ",["a",{"href":"/help"},"User manual"],"."],["p",{},"The project is maintained and developed voluntarily by a dedicated scorer who happens to know a thing or two about programming as well. However, it will take long before it reaches ideal shape, if ever. Shall you encounter any incorrect or odd behavior or something that is missing and should be also included, don''t hesitate to contact the author - either directly via ",["a",{"href":"mailto:alois.seckar%7B''@''%7Dgmail.com"},"my email"]," or you can use ",["a",{"href":"https://github.com/AloisSeckar/WBSC-Scoring/issues","rel":["nofollow"]},"GitHub Issues"]," for creating new report/question/suggestion directly there. If you do so, try to describe your issue, so it can be addressed. Screenshots are useful to see what is happening. You may want to check our ",["a",{"href":"/help"},"reporting bugs guide"],"."],["p",{},"This program is still evolving. Visit the ",["a",{"href":"/project#todo"},"\"TODO\" section"]," in Project overview to check what is yet planned to be implemented. Refer to the ",["a",{"href":"/project#limitations"},"\"Limitations\" list"]," to see what is certainly not possible atm."],["p",{},"This is an ",["a",{"href":"https://unlicense.org/","rel":["nofollow"]},"UNLICENSE"]," open source that can be found ",["a",{"href":"https://github.com/AloisSeckar/WBSC-Scoring","rel":["nofollow"]},"HERE"],". Any help with further development would be appreciated, but you can as well take the source code and do whatever you want with it yourself."],["p",{},["a",{"id":"done"}]],["h2",{"id":"done"},"DONE"],["p",{},["strong",{},"what you can find here"]],["ul",{"className":["list-disc"]},["li",{},"Action editor capable of inserting most of existing situations according to latest version of WBSC manual"],["li",{},"Download output images as PNG"],["li",{},"Export/Import actions in JSON format"],["li",{},"Actions library with more than 200 predefined plays"],["li",{},"User manual"],["li",{},"English, Italian and Czech translation"]],["p",{},["a",{"id":"todo"}]],["h2",{"id":"to-do-list"},"TO-DO list"],["p",{},["strong",{},"hopefully will be implemented in next few releases"]],["ul",{"className":["list-disc"]},["li",{},"Reorganizing actions library for greater clarity"],["li",{},"Translations to other languages"],["li",{},"Info pages with scoresheet description and ways of marking substitutions"],["li",{},"More input validations"],["li",{},"Output corrections and fixes where necessary"]],["p",{},["a",{"id":"limitations"}]],["h2",{"id":"limitations"},"Limitations"],["p",{},["strong",{},"not planned to be implemented soon"]],["p",{},"There are several features of WBSC scoring system that are currently not covered by this program. They may be included in some future releases, but no promises."],["ul",{"className":["list-disc"]},["li",{},"It is not possible to specify actions leading to runners appearing on bases (except TIE). INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/en/report.md', 'Report', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"reporting-bugs"},"REPORTING BUGS"],["p",{},["em",{},"In every computer program there is at least one bug."]],["p",{},"This saying might be a little exaggerated, but generally it is quite hard to keep any application error prone. I am doing my best developing \"WBSC-like Scoring\", also having quite solid bunch of automated tests with dozens of situations to test every time before I add/update/fix something, but basically, I am sure there are still mistakes hidden around and waiting to be discovered. And if not mistakes, then you''ll probably come up with some \"nice to have\" new features I haven''t thought about yet."],["p",{},"I am ready for all your input. Here on this page, you can find details about the reporting process."],["h2",{"id":"github-issues"},"GitHub issues"],["p",{},"GitHub provides a simple, yet sufficient bug/feature tracking system, which is being used for this project."],["p",{},"You can find all the issues related to \"WBSC-like Scoring\" ",["a",{"href":"https://github.com/AloisSeckar/WBSC-Scoring/issues","rel":["nofollow"]},"HERE"],". The default filter shows opened issues, that are known to me, but are about to be dealt with yet."],["p",{},"If you are familiar with GitHub, feel free to open a new issue on your own. I will try to address it ASAP."],["h2",{"id":"manual-reporting"},"Manual reporting"],["p",{},"If you''re not sure how to deal with GitHub, you are of course welcome traditional ways of communication."],["p",{},"The best option is to write me an email to ",["a",{"href":"mailto:alois.seckar%7B''@''%7Dgmail.com"},"alois.seckar{''@''}gmail.com"],"."],["p",{},"Alternative ways of contacting me via social media are listed ",["a",{"href":"http://alois-seckar.cz/","rel":["nofollow"]},"HERE"],"."],["h2",{"id":"what-to-include-in-the-report"},"What to include in the report?"],["p",{},"To be able to track down the issue I urge you to keep some basic structure of the reports with all the necessary details attached. Please always try to include following points:"],["h3",{"id":"what-is-wrong"},"What is wrong?"],["p",{},"A brief, yet meaningful explanation of what seems to be broken/malfunctioning."],["h3",{"id":"reproduction"},"Reproduction"],["p",{},"A sequence of user steps and interactions leading to the situation. This is important, because some things depend on the exact order of things, and I might not be able to do it the same way unless you tell me how."],["h3",{"id":"screenshots"},"Screenshots"],["p",{},"A visualization of the problem often speaks for itself. Actually, good screenshots may be worth more than the text explanation alone."],["p",{},"I would be interested in the picture of the output (to see what is wrong), but also (and MAINLY) of the inputs, because the cause may often be hidden right there. Please always try to attach them."],["h3",{"id":"console-output"},"Console output"],["p",{},"This is an advanced topic, but it can also help me a lot. As you visit any website, the actions your browser is performing during rendering the content may manifest here. Especially when some error occurs, a red text may appear here giving hints to developers about the cause."],["p",{},"Here is an example of console output (after I picked wrong file type during importing input):"],["div",{},["article-image",{"src":"report-console.png","alt":"","css":"w-full md:w-[768px]"}]]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"reporting-bugs","depth":2,"text":"REPORTING BUGS"},{"id":"github-issues","depth":2,"text":"GitHub issues"},{"id":"manual-reporting","depth":2,"text":"Manual reporting"},{"id":"what-to-include-in-the-report","depth":2,"text":"What to include in the report?","children":[{"id":"what-is-wrong","depth":3,"text":"What is wrong?"},{"id":"reproduction","depth":3,"text":"Reproduction"},{"id":"screenshots","depth":3,"text":"Screenshots"},{"id":"console-output","depth":3,"text":"Console output"}]}]}}', '', 'md', '{}', 'true', '/en/report', '{"description":""}', 'en/report', 'pcGBfcix8HPBlg5X_icuZDcvL_R09bkU9tJvfvNziAk'); -- pcGBfcix8HPBlg5X_icuZDcvL_R09bkU9tJvfvNziAk

INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/it/project.md', 'Project', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"descrizione-progetto"},"DESCRIZIONE PROGETTO"],["p",{},["strong",{},"WBSC-like Scoring Creator"]," è un programma basato su JavaScript che permette di selezionare combinazioni di azioni che possono verificarsi in una partita di baseball/softball per visualizzare il modo di segnare tale azione nel sistema di punteggio ",["a",{"href":"https://www.wbsc.org/","rel":["nofollow"]},"WBSC"],".
